description: PANCHMEL DAL - Panchmel Dal or Panchratan Dal is the pride of Mewar. This recipe is my version of the dish.. 5 दालों का मेल, यानी, सिर्फ स्वाद ही नहीं, भरपूर सेहत भी। 🍽️𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡 𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣 🍽️ RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer Kitchen Appliances - https://bit.ly/KitchenAppliancesIUse
ingredients: 1 tbsp Ghee (घी) | ¼ cup Masoor Dal (मसूर दाल) | ¼ cup Chana Dal (चना दाल) | ¼ cup Tuvar Dal (तुवर दाल) | ¼ cup Moong Dal (मूंग दाल) | ¼ cup Urad dal (उड़द दाल) | Salt to taste (नमक स्वादानुसार) | 1 tsp Turmeric Powder (हल्दी पाउडर) | ½ tsp Degi Red Chilli Powder (देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर) | 2 tbsp Ghee (घी) | 2-3 Dry Red Chillies (सूखी लाल मिर्च) | ½ tsp Cumin Seeds (जीरा) | ¼ tsp Asafoetida (हींग) | 1 medium Onion – sliced (प्याज़) | 1 inch Ginger – crushed (अदरक) | 1 tsp Degi Red Chilli Powder (देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर) | 4 tbsp Oil (तेल) | 2 Dry Red Chillies (सूखी लाल मिर्च) | ½ tsp Degi Red Chilli Powder (देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर)
instructions: In a cooker add ghee, water, masoor dal, chana dal, tuvar dal, moong dal. | Add urad dal, salt, turmeric powder , degi red chilli powder then put the lid on and give it 3-4 whistles. | Switch off the flames and let it cool down properly. | For Tempering | In a kadai, add ghee, dry red chillies, cumin seeds, asafoetida and let it splutter well. | Add onion, ginger and sauté until translucent. | Now add degi red chilli powder and the cooked dal from the cooker. | Boil it for 5 to 7 minutes on medium heat. | Garnish it with the prepared chilli oil and coriander sprig. | Serve hot with steam rice. | For Chilli Oil | In a tadka pan, heat oil once it's hot, add dry red chilli, degi red chilli powder and mix it well. | *********************** | For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: | 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid | 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS | *********************** | 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar on your favorite Social Media channels: | ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ | ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ | ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar

Add urad dal, salt, turmeric powder , degi red chilli powder then put the lid on and give it 3-4 whistles. Switch off the flames and let it cool down properly. For Tempering In a kadai, add ghee, dry red chillies, cumin seeds, asafoetida and let it splutter well. Add onion, ginger and sauté until translucent. Now add degi red chilli powder and the cooked dal from the cooker. Boil it for 5 to 7 minutes on medium heat. Garnish it with the prepared chilli oil and coriander sprig. Serve hot with steam rice. For Chilli Oil In a tadka pan, heat oil once it's hot, add dry red chilli, degi red chilli powder and mix it well. *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar on your favorite Social Media channels: ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar #panchmeldal #daltadka #Ranveerbrar #dalfry #dhabadal #easydalrecipe #healthydalrecipe #DaltadkaRanveerbrar #rajasthanidal

For Masala In a non-stick pan, add fennel seeds, cumin seeds, cinnamon stick, cloves, dry roast on medium flame. Transfer it into a bowl, add salt to taste once it cools down, grind it into a fine powder. For Paneer Masala In a deep bottom pan, add oil, ghee once it is hot, add star anise, curry leaves, cumin seeds and let it splutter well. Add prepared ginger garlic paste and saute it on medium flame until light brown in color. Add onion and saute it well. Add coriander powder, guntur red chilli powder and keep sauteing until the spices turn aromatic. Add tomato, green chilli and saute it well until tomatoes turn soft. Add little water and cook on medium flame for 5 minutes. Add prepared masala, curry leaves and mix it well. Add fried paneer and mix everything well. Simmer it for 5 minutes. Add coriander leaves and mix it well. Garnish it with fried curry leaves and serve hot with roti. For Paneer Marination In a bowl, add paneer, a pinch of asafoetida, turmeric powder, a pinch of degi red chilli powder, oil and marinate well. Heat oil in a non-stick pan, add marinated paneer and fry for a minute to make sure all the sides are cooked well. *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar on your favorite Social Media channels: ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar #paneermasala #paneerrecipes #ranveerbrar #paneersabji #Paneerbuttermasala #paneertikkamasala #paneergravy #dhabapaneermasala #paneertikka

raw_text: EGGLESS OMELETTE - Whether you dont have eggs at home, or you cant have eggs at home, you can still enjoy an omelette!! Here's how :) *********************** 🛒𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡 𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣 🛒 🔪Knives I use - https://amzn.to/41Z6eUg 🛍️RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer 📟Kitchen Appliances - https://bit.ly/KitchenAppliancesIUse *********************** ⏩𝓢𝓾𝓫𝓼𝓬𝓻𝓲𝓫𝓮 𝓱𝓮𝓻𝓮: https://goo.gl/UE2pmL *********************** 𝗖𝗵𝗲𝗰𝗸 𝗼𝘂𝘁 𝘁𝗵𝗲𝘀𝗲 𝗿𝗲𝗰𝗶𝗽𝗲𝘀 𝘁𝗼𝗼: Masala Omelette - https://youtu.be/sAa-CEl5Z-k 5 Types of Cheela - https://youtu.be/jIurvPodGB8 Besan ki Sabji - https://youtu.be/udXqe3BixEk *********************** EGGLESS OMELETTE/ BINA ANDE KA OMELETTE Preparation time 10 minutes Cooking time 15-20 minutes Serving 2 Ingredients ½ tbsp Oil, तेल 1 tsp Butter, मक्खन 1 medium Onion, chopped, प्याज 2 Green chilli, chopped, हरी मिर्च ½ inch Ginger, chopped, अदरक 1 medium size Tomato, chopped, टमाटर 1 tbsp Coriander leaves, chopped, धनिया पत्ता ¼ cup Process cheese, grated, चीज For Batter 1 Bread slice, (trim the edges), ब्रेड स्लाइस 1 cup Gram flour, बेसन ⅓ cup Refined flour, मैदा Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार ¼ tsp Sugar, चीनी 1 tbsp light Saffroncolor water or Haldi (optional) 1 cup Milk, दूध ½-¾ cup Water, पानी 1/2 to 1 tsp Baking soda, बेकिंग सोडा 1-2 tbsp Melted butter, मक्खन Other Ingredients 1 tbsp Oil, तेल 1 Tomato, cut into half, टमाटर 1 medium size Boiled potato, diced, आलू Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार Black pepper powder, काली मिर्च पाउडर For Bread Omelette 1 tsp Oil,तेल 2 Bread slice, ब्रेड स्लाइस 1 tbsp Butter, मक्खन 3-4 tbsp Process cheese, grated, चीज For Garnish Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता Process In a non-stick pan, add oil, butter. Once it's hot add a little onion, green chilli, ginger, tomato and saute it well. Add coriander leaves and saute for a minute. Now, pour a ladle full of batter and rotate the pan so that it spreads evenly all around. Cook till the underside is done and the edges begin to loosen Add grated cheese on one side and roll. In a non-stick pan, add oil once it's hot, add tomato and potato. Season it with salt and pepper and cook until it's light brown in color. Serve hot with charred tomatoes and potatoes. For Batter In a bowl, add trim bread slice, gram flour, refined flour, salt to taste, sugar, and saffron water. Add milk, water, baking soda and whisk it well. Make sure there's no lumps or you can bend it with the help of a hand blender. In a non-stick pan, add butter once it's melted, pour it into the batter bowl and whisk it again nicely. Keep aside for at least 15 min before further use. For Bread Omelette In another non-stick pan, add oil once it's hot, add remaining onion, green chilli, ginger saute it well. Add tomatoes, coriander leaves and saute for a minute. Pour a ladle full of batter and rotate the pan so that it spreads evenly all around. Apply butter on both the bread slice, place the bread slice on the pan butter side upward. Flip the omelette on the other side, add grated cheese and fold it from all the sides. Place the other bread slice on top and then flip it so that the other bread slice gets toasted. Once the surface crisps up, take it off heat. Serve hot. #VegOmelette #Breadomelette #Ranveerbrar *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar on your favorite Social Media channels: ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar #omelette #eggless #Egglessomelette #vegomelette #besankacheela #Breadomelette #vegomeletteindianrecipe #howtomakevegomeletteathome #Fluffyomelette #perfectomelette

title: पालक दाल तड़का | ढाबा स्टाइल दाल पालक | Palak Dal Tadka & Masala Pulao | Chef Ranveer Brar
description: DAL PALAK with MASALA PULAO - Sometimes all you need in life is a good Dal-Chawal, right? How about Dal Palak and Masala Pulao? *********************** 𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡 𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣 🔪Knives I use - https://amzn.to/41Z6eUg
ingredients: 2 tbsp Ghee, घी | 1 cup washed Tovar dal, slightly soaked, तूर दाल | 1 cup washed Masoor dal, slightly soaked, मसूर दाल | 1 cup washed Yellow moong dal, slightly soaked, पीली मूंग दाल | 1 tsp Degi red chilli powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर | ½ tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर | A pinch of asafoetida, हींग | Salt to taste, नमक स्वादानुसार | 7-8 cups Water for cooking, पानी | Prepared remaining Tadka, तैयार किया हुआ तड़का | 1 ½ tbsp Ghee, घी | 1 tsp Cumin seeds, जीरा | A pinch of asafoetida, हींग | 2-3 Garlic cloves, chopped, लहसुन | 1 large Onion, chopped, प्याज | 2 Green chilli, chopped, हरी मिर्च | 1 tsp Degi red chilli powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर | 1 tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर | A pinch of asafoetida, हींग | 1 tsp Coriander powder, धनिया पाउडर | 1 tsp Ghee, घी | ½ cup fresh Tomato puree, ताज़े टमाटर की प्यूरी | 2 cups fresh Spinach leaves, chopped,पालक | ½ cup Water, पानी | Salt to taste, नमक स्वादानुसार | 1 tbsp Oil, तेल | ½ tsp Cumin seeds, जीरा | 2 Dry red chilli, cut into half, सूखी लाल मिर्च | A pinch of asafoetida, हींग | ½ tsp Degi red chilli powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर | 1 tbsp Oil, तेल | 1 tsp Cumin seeds,जीरा | ½ cup Prepared Tadka, तैयार किया हुआ तड़का (remove before adding spinach) | 2 cups Cooked rice, पके हुए चावल | 2 Green chilli, chopped, हरी मिर्च | 2 tbsp Coriander leaves, chopped, धनिया पत्ता
instructions: In a deep sauce pot, add ghee, soaked tovar dal, masoor dal, yellow moong dal and mix it well. | Add degi red chilli powder, turmeric powder, a pinch of asafoetida mix it well on medium flame. | Now, add salt to taste and water. | Cover it with the lid and cook until it's done. | Once the dal is cooked, pour the prepared tadka and mix it well. | In the same pan, add water, salt to taste and bring it to a boil. | Transfer it into the sauce pot and mix it well. | In a serving bowl, add prepared dal and pour the second tadka on top of it. | Garnish it with coriander sprig and serve hot with masala pulav. | For First Tadka | In a non-stick pan, add ghee, cumin seeds and let it splutter. | Add a pinch of asafoetida, garlic saute until light brown. | Add onion and saute it well, add green chilli, degi red chilli powder. | Turmeric powder, a pinch of asafoetida, coriander powder and saute it well. | Add little ghee and saute for a minute. | Add fresh tomato puree and saute on medium flame. | Remove atles 1 cup of prepared tadka in a bowl and keep it aside for further use. | Now, add chopped spinach and mix everything well. | For Second Tadka | Heat oil in a tadka pan, add cumin seeds and let it splutter well. | Add dry red chillies, a pinch of asafoetida and saute well. | Add degi red chilli powder and saute it well. | For Masala Pulav | In a deep bottom non-stick pan, add oil, once it's hot, add cumin seeds, prepare first tadka and mix it well. | Add fresh fenugreek leaves and saute it well. | Add cooked rice and mix everything well. | Add green chilli, coriander leaves and mix it well. | *********************** | For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: | 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid | 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS | *********************** | 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar on your favorite Social Media channels: | ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ | ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ | ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar

http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** DAL PALAK & MASALA PULAO Preparation time 10 minutes Cooking time 25-30 minutes Serving 2 Ingredients 2 tbsp Ghee, घी 1 cup washed Tovar dal, slightly soaked, तूर दाल 1 cup washed Masoor dal, slightly soaked, मसूर दाल 1 cup washed Yellow moong dal, slightly soaked, पीली मूंग दाल 1 tsp Degi red chilli powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर ½ tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर A pinch of asafoetida, हींग Salt to taste, नमक स्वादानुसार 7-8 cups Water for cooking, पानी Prepared remaining Tadka, तैयार किया हुआ तड़का For First Tadka 1 ½ tbsp Ghee, घी 1 tsp Cumin seeds, जीरा A pinch of asafoetida, हींग 2-3 Garlic cloves, chopped, लहसुन 1 large Onion, chopped, प्याज 2 Green chilli, chopped, हरी मिर्च 1 tsp Degi red chilli powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर 1 tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर A pinch of asafoetida, हींग 1 tsp Coriander powder, धनिया पाउडर 1 tsp Ghee, घी ½ cup fresh Tomato puree, ताज़े टमाटर की प्यूरी 2 cups fresh Spinach leaves, chopped,पालक ½ cup Water, पानी Salt to taste, नमक स्वादानुसार For Second Tadka 1 tbsp Oil, तेल ½ tsp Cumin seeds, जीरा 2 Dry red chilli, cut into half, सूखी लाल मिर्च A pinch of asafoetida, हींग ½ tsp Degi red chilli powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर For Garnish Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता Lemon wedge, नींबू की फलियां For Masala Pulav 1 tbsp Oil, तेल 1 tsp Cumin seeds,जीरा ½ cup Prepared Tadka, तैयार किया हुआ तड़का (remove before adding spinach) few fresh Fenugreek leaves, ताजा मेथी के पत्ते 2 cups Cooked rice, पके हुए चावल 2 Green chilli, chopped, हरी मिर्च 2 tbsp Coriander leaves, chopped, धनिया पत्ता Process In a deep sauce pot, add ghee, soaked tovar dal, masoor dal, yellow moong dal and mix it well. Add degi red chilli powder, turmeric powder, a pinch of asafoetida mix it well on medium flame. Now, add salt to taste and water. Cover it with the lid and cook until it's done. Once the dal is cooked, pour the prepared tadka and mix it well. In the same pan, add water, salt to taste and bring it to a boil. Transfer it into the sauce pot and mix it well. In a serving bowl, add prepared dal and pour the second tadka on top of it. Garnish it with coriander sprig and serve hot with masala pulav. For First Tadka In a non-stick pan, add ghee, cumin seeds and let it splutter. Add a pinch of asafoetida, garlic saute until light brown. Add onion and saute it well, add green chilli, degi red chilli powder. Turmeric powder, a pinch of asafoetida, coriander powder and saute it well. Add little ghee and saute for a minute. Add fresh tomato puree and saute on medium flame. Remove atles 1 cup of prepared tadka in a bowl and keep it aside for further use. Now, add chopped spinach and mix everything well. For Second Tadka Heat oil in a tadka pan, add cumin seeds and let it splutter well. Add dry red chillies, a pinch of asafoetida and saute well. Add degi red chilli powder and saute it well. For Masala Pulav In a deep bottom non-stick pan, add oil, once it's hot, add cumin seeds, prepare first tadka and mix it well. Add fresh fenugreek leaves and saute it well. Add cooked rice and mix everything well. Add green chilli, coriander leaves and mix it well. *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar on your favorite Social Media channels: ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar #PalakDal #DalTadka #Ranveerbrar #palakdal #Dalpalak #Dhabadal #Dalfry #Masalapulao #Dalchawal #Pulav #Dhabastyledaltadka #howtomakedaltadka

powder, हल्दी पाउडर ½ tbsp Oil 2 tbsp Water Oil for frying, तेल तलने के लिए 1 Green chilli, chopped, हरी मिर्च ¼ Ginger, chopped, अदरक ½ tbsp Coriander leaves, chopped, धनिया पत्ता Sev, सेव ¼ tsp Chaat masala, चाट मसाला A degi red chilli powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर 1 tbsp Spring onion, white part, chopped, प्याज़ पत्ता ½ Lemon juice, नींबू का रस 2 tbsp Pomegranate pearl, अनार के दाने Frying Chinese Style Crispy Chana 3 cups Chickpeas, soaked, boiled, छोले Salt to taste ¼ cup Cornflour, कॉर्न फ्लोर 3 tbsp Refined flour, मैदा 2 tbsp Rice flour, चावल का आटा A pinch of baking soda, बेकिंग सोडा 2 tbsp Water, पानी Oil for frying, तेल तलने के लिए Chana Manchurian 1 tsp Oil ½ inch Ginger, chopped, अदरक 1 Whole Spring onion, chopped Salt to taste 1 tsp Soy sauce, सोया सॉस ¼ tsp Sugar Water 1 cup Fried Chinese style chana, चाइनीस स्टाइल तला हुआ चना 1 tbsp Coriander leaves, roughly torn ¼ tsp Vinegar, सिरका Crispy Chilli Chana 1 tsp Oil ½ Onion, chopped ¼ Capsicum, chopped, शिमला मिर्च ¼ Ginger, chopped, अदरक 1 tsp Soy sauce, सोया सॉस 1 tsp Red chilli sauce, रेड चिली सॉस 1 tbsp Tomato ketchup, टॉमैटो केचप ¼ tsp Vinegar, सिरका Salt to taste 1 cup Fried Chinese style chana, चाइनीस तला हुआ चना Salt to taste ½ tsp Black pepper powder, काली मिर्च पाउडर Process : Chana Jor: In a bowl, add boiled chickpeas (which should be 70% cooked). Add black pepper powder, salt to taste, and lemon juice mix it well. Add a little more black pepper powder and mix it well. Heat oil in a kadai, fry the chickpeas on low heat until nice crispy. Remove on an absorbent paper, sprinkle some black pepper powder and mix well. In the same oil, fry the whole dry red chillies until crispy. Serve with crushed dry red chilli on top. Crispy Chana Chat: In a bowl, add boiled chickpeas (which should be 70% cooked), ginger garlic paste, gram flour, salt to taste, rice flour, dry mango powder, a pinch of asafoetida, degi red chilli powder, turmeric powder, oil and water mix everything well. Heat oil in a kadai and fry the chickpeas in hot oil on medium heat until crispy then remove on an absorbent paper and let them cool down. In a bowl add green chilli, ginger, coriander leaves, sev, fried chickpeas, chaat masala, degi red chilli powder, spring onion, lemon juice, pomegranate pearl then mix everything properly and serve immediately. Chinese Style Crispy Chana : In a bowl, add boiled chickpeas (which should be 70% cooked) salt, cornflour, refined flour, rice flour, a pinch of baking soda, water and mix everything well. Heat oil in a kadai and fry the chickpeas in hot oil on high heat until crispy then remove on an absorbent paper and let them cool down. Chana Manchurian : In a wok, heat oil and add ginger, whole chopped spring onion, salt, soy sauce, sugar, little water, fried chinese style chana, coriander leaves, vinegar then saute everything properly, and serve hot immediately. Crispy Chilli Chana: In a wok, heat oil and add onion, capsicum, ginger, soy sauce, red chilli sauce, tomato ketchup, vinegar, salt, fried chinese style chana, then saute everything properly, and serve hot immediately. For South Indian Chana Fry: In hot oil deep fry garlic, green chilli, curry leaves until crispy and little brown. Remove in a bowl and add fried chinese style chana, salt, black pepper powder then mix everything properly and serve immediately. *********************** 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar on your favorite Social Media channels: ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar

Try this spicy Chicken Masala gravy / curry, Dhaba style and let me know if this sorted your weekend dinner plans :) *********************** 𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡 𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣 🔪Knives I use - https://amzn.to/41Z6eUg 🛒RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer 📟Kitchen Appliances - https://bit.ly/KitchenAppliancesIUse *********************** ⏩𝓒𝓵𝓲𝓬𝓴 𝓽𝓸 𝓢𝓾𝓫𝓼𝓬𝓻𝓲𝓫𝓮 : https://goo.gl/UE2pmL *********************** 𝗖𝗵𝗲𝗰𝗸 𝗼𝘂𝘁 𝘁𝗵𝗲𝘀𝗲 𝗿𝗲𝗰𝗶𝗽𝗲𝘀 𝘁𝗼𝗼: https://bit.ly/ChickenRecipesbyRB *********************** CHICKEN DHABA MASALA Preparation time 10-15 minutes Cooking time 20-25 minutes Serving 2 Ingredients For Chicken Masala 12-15 Black peppercorns, काली मिर्च के दाने 1 Mace, जावित्री 1 tsp Cumin seeds, जीरा 1 tbsp Coriander seeds, धनिया की बीज 2 Cloves, लॉन्ग 4-5 Green cardamom, हरी इलायची 1 Black cardamom, बड़ी इलायची Salt to taste, नमक स्वादानुसार For Marinating Chicken 1 whole Chicken, (cut into big pieces), चिकन Salt to taste, नमक स्वादानुसार 1 heaped tsp Ginger Garlic paste, अदरक लहसुन का पेस्ट 1 ½ heaped tsp Degi red chilli powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर ½ Lemon juice, नींबू का रस 1 tsp Oil, तेल For Tempering 2 tbsp Ghee, घी 2 tbsp Oil, तेल 1 tsp Cumin seeds, जीरा 3 medium size Onion, chopped, प्याज Marinated chicken, मैरिनेटेड चिकन 2 Green chilli, slit, हरी मिर्च Few Mint leaves, पुदीने के पत्ते Salt to taste, नमक स्वादानुसार 1 heaped tbsp Coriander powder, धनिया पाउडर 1 tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर 1 tbsp Degi red chilli powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर ¼ cup Water, पानी ½ cup fresh Tomato puree, ताज़े टमाटर की प्यूरी ½ cup Water, पानी 2 tsp Prepared chicken masala, तैयार किया हुआ मसाला 1 tsp Kasuri methi, crushed, कसूरी मेथी For Garnish fresh Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता Process For Chicken Masala In a pan, add black peppercorns, mace, cumin seeds, coriander seeds. Add cloves, green cardamom, black cardamom, salt to taste. Dry roast on low flame until the spices turn aromatic. Transfer it into a grinder jar and grind into a fine powder. Keep it aside for further use. For Marinating Chicken In a bowl, add chicken pieces, salt to taste, ginger garlic paste. Add degi red chilli powder, lemon juice and oil. Marinate everything well and keep it for 10-15 minutes. For Tempering In a heavy bottom pot, add ghee, oil once it's hot and add cumin seeds, let it splutter. Add onion and saute on medium flame until translucent. Add marinated chicken and cook for 5-10 minutes. Add green chilli, mint leaves, salt to taste and saute it well. Add coriander powder, turmeric powder, degi red chilli powder and saute it well. Add little water while sauteing it. Add fresh tomato puree, water and cover it with the lid and cook for atls 15-20 minutes on medium flame. Add prepared chicken masala, kasuri methi and mix well. http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** BURGER PIZZA Preparation time 10 minutes Cooking time 15-20 minutes Serving 2 Ingredients For Filling 2 medium potato, boiled & grated, आलू ⅓ cup Paneer, grated, पनीर ½ tsp Oregano, ओरिगैनो ½ tsp Chilli flakes, चिल्ली फ्लेक्स 2 tbsp Mayonnaise, मायोनिज Salt to taste, नमक स्वादानुसार 2 Green chilli, chopped, हरी मिर्च ½ inch Ginger, chopped, अदरक ½ medium size Carrot, chopped, गाजर For Topping ½ tbsp Oil, तेल ½ Tomato, chopped, टमाटर ½ Capsicum, chopped, शिमला मिर्च ½ Onion, chopped, प्याज Salt to taste, नमक स्वादानुसार ¼ tsp Oregano, ओरिगैनो ¼ tsp Chilli flakes, चिल्ली फ्लेक्स For Toasting Burger Buns 1 tbsp Butter, मक्खन 2 Burger buns, cut into half, बर्गर बन For Assembling Toasted buns, टोस्टेड बंन Prepared filling, तैयार फीलिंग Tomato ketchup, टाॅमेटो केचप Pizza cheese blend, चीज Prepared topping, तैयार टॉपिंग्स Pizza cheese blend, चीज 1 tbsp Oil, तेल For Butter Corn 1 tbsp Butter, मक्खन ½ cup Sweet corn, blanched, भुट्टे के दाने A pinch of oregano, ओरिगैनो A pinch of chilli flakes, चिल्ली फ्लेक्स Few coriander leaves, chopped, धनिया पत्ता Salt to taste, नमक स्वादानुसार A pinch of sugar, चीनी 2-4 Cherry tomato, cut into half, चेरी टमाटर For Garnish Cheese slices, चीज स्लाइस Black olive, काले जैतून Cherry tomato, cut into half, चेरी टमाटर Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता Process For Filling In a bowl, add grated potato, paneer, oregano, chilli flakes, mayonnaise, salt to taste. Add green chilli, ginger, carrot and mix everything well and keep aside for further use. For Topping Heat oil in a non-stick pan, add onion, tomato, capsicum and toss. Add salt to taste, oregano, chilli flakes and toss it well. Once it's done transfer it into another bowl, keep it aside for future use. For Toasting Burger Buns In a non-stick pan, add butter once it's melted toast the buns from both the sides. Until nice golden in color. Keep it aside for further use. For Assembling Now, place the toasted bottom bun and spread the filling all over the bun. Keep the other toasted bun on top of it, spread the tomato ketchup all over the bun nicely. Spread some pizza cheese blend, add the prepared toppings. Once again, add the pizza cheese blend on top of the topping. Heat oil in a non-stick pan, now place the prepared burger pizza. Cover it with the other pan so that the cheese melted from its heat. Garnish it with cheese slices, black olive, cherry tomato and coriander sprig and insert it with a toothpick. Serve hot with butter corn . For Butter Corn In a non-stick pan, add butter once it's melted, add sweet corn and toss it well. Add a pinch of oregano, chilli flakes, coriander leaves, salt to taste, sugar, cherry tomatoes and toss it well. Serve hot with burger pizza. *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar on your favorite Social Media channels: ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar #Burgerpizza #pizzaburger #pizzatopping #vegpizza #pizzacheese #burgerpatty #vegburger #cheeseburger #burgeraloopatty #alootikkiburger #Burger #cheesePizza

raw_text: GUR KE CHAWAL / JAGGERY RICE - Lots of memories attached to this recipe. Enjoy Sunday traditional style with this close to heart recipe. #Gurkechawal #Meethechawal #Ranveerbrar *********************** 𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡 𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣 🔪Knives I use - https://amzn.to/41Z6eUg 🛒RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer 📟Kitchen Appliances - https://bit.ly/KitchenAppliancesIUse *********************** ⏩𝓢𝓾𝓫𝓼𝓬𝓻𝓲𝓫𝓮 𝓱𝓮𝓻𝓮: https://goo.gl/UE2pmL *********************** 𝗖𝗵𝗲𝗰𝗸 𝗼𝘂𝘁 𝘁𝗵𝗲𝘀𝗲 𝗿𝗲𝗰𝗶𝗽𝗲𝘀 𝘁𝗼𝗼: https://bit.ly/FestiveRecipesbyRB *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App 📲 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** GUR KE CHAWAL Preparation time 10 minutes Cooking time 25-30 minutes Serving 4 Ingredients For Jaggery Syrup 2 ½ cups Water, पानी 450 gm Jaggery, chopped, गुड ½ tsp Fennel seeds, सौंफ few Cardamom seeds, इलायची के दाने A pinch Salt, नमक For Gur ke Chawal 1 tbsp Ghee, घी 15-20 Raisins, किशमिश 40-50 gm Dry coconut, sliced, सूखा खोपरा 3 cups Basmati classic, soaked for 20 minutes, बासमती चावल 4 cups Water, पानी Prepared Jaggery Syrup , तैयार गुड़ की चाशनी 2-3 tbsp Jaggery, chopped, गुड For Garnish Pistachio, sliced पिस्ता Mint sprig , पुदीना Silver warq, चांदी का वर्क fresh Rose petals, गुलाब की पंखुड़ियां Saffron strands, केसर Process For Jaggery Syrup In a deep bottom sauce pot, add water, jaggery, fennel seeds, cardamom seeds and cook on medium flame. Add jaggery, a pinch of salt and keep cooking until the jaggery completely melts. For Gur Ke Chawal In a deep pot, add ghee, raisins, dry coconut, and saute on medium flame until the raisins puffs. Add basmati rice and saute it well for a minute. Add water and mix it well. Cover it with the lid and cook on medium flame upto 70 %. Now, add prepared jaggery syrup and mix it well. Cover it with a lid and cook on medium flame. Onces the rice is cooked, switch off the flame, add jaggery, cover it with a lid for a few minutes and let the jaggery melt on its own steam. Onces the jaggery is melted, mix it well. Garnish it with pistachio, mint sprig, silver warq, fresh rose petals, saffron strands and serve hot. *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar on your favorite Social Media channels: ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar

Add onion, curry leaves and saute it well. Add turmeric powder, degi red chilli powder, coriander powder and mix it well. Add fresh tomato puree and cook on medium flame for 5 minutes. Add the frying potato and mix it well. Add little water and cover it with the lid and cook on medium flame. Add salt to taste and mix everything well. Keep aside for further use. For Ginger Garlic Paste In a mortar pestle, add ginger, garlic, salt to taste and make a paste of it. For Masala Potato Shakshuka In a small non-stick pan, add butter onces it's melted, add prepared potato mixture. Now, add cheese blend, whole eggs and cover it with a lid and cook for 5-8 minutes, or until the eggs are done. Garnish it with coriander sprig and serve hot. *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar on your favorite Social Media channels: ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar #Hyderabadipotatoeggcurry #eggmasala #eggrecipe #andamasala #Hyderabadiandamasala #Salliparedu #Parsieggcurry #Shakshuka #Turkishpoachedeggs #Howtopoacheggs

Keep aside for at least 30 minutes. After that pour this batter in a medium sized pan and place it on low heat. Cook from both sides until light golden. Remove and keep aside to cool down. Once cooled cut it in the strips like french fries. Then deep fry in medium hot oil until golden brown and crispy. Remove and serve with tempered ketchup and garnish with tomato wedges and coriander leaves. For Tempered Ketchup In a pan heat oil and add mustard seeds, ginger, curry leaves, green chillies saute for a minute. Switch off the flames and add little water mix properly then add tomato ketchup and bring everything together. Keep aside for further use. *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar on your favorite Social Media channels: ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar #frenchfries #fries #Ranveerbrar #besan #besanfries #friedfood #recipe #newrecipe #trendingnow #food #cooking #easysnack #kidsrecipes #easyrecipe #homemade #howtomakefries #fries🍟 #McdonaldsFrenchfries #FrenchFries #Snackrecipe

https://youtu.be/pzRRJ0xQA2I Mixed Veg Makhanwala - https://youtu.be/K71SBq3Sh-c Aloo Gobhi ki Sabji - https://youtu.be/PhgyyJE90w8 *********************** ⏩𝓢𝓾𝓫𝓼𝓬𝓻𝓲𝓫𝓮 𝓱𝓮𝓻𝓮: https://goo.gl/UE2pmL *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App 📲 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** VEG DIWANI HANDI & JEERA PULAO Preparation time 10 minutes Cooking time 20-25 minutes Serving 2-4 Ingredients: For Gravy 2 tbsp Oil, तेल 1 tbsp Ghee, घी 1 tsp Cumin seeds, जीरा 1 large Onion, chopped, प्याज 2 medium size Tomato, chopped, टमाटर ½ tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर 1 tsp Degi red chilli powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर 1 tbsp Coriander powder, धनिया पाउडर 3 tbsp Curd, beaten, दही 10-12 Cashewnut, काजू Water, पानी ¼ tsp Sugar, चीनी For Ginger Chilli Paste ½ inch Ginger, slice, अदरक 2 fresh Green chilli, हरी मिर्च Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार For Tempering 1 tbsp Ghee, घी 2 tbsp Oil, तेल 2 Garlic cloves, chopped, लहसुन 1 medium size Carrot, diced, गाजर 4-5 Mushroom, cut into half, मशरूम 1 cup Cauliflower, medium size florets, फूलगोभी ½ tsp Dry Fenugreek leaves powder, कसूरी मेथी का पाउडर ½ tsp Cumin powder, जीरा पाउडर Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार 10-12 French beans, chopped, बीन्स 1 cup Water, पानी Prepared Gravy, तैयार की हुई ग्रेवी 5-6 Cashewnut, blanched, काजू 1 tbsp Coriander leaves, chopped, धनिया पत्ता ½ tsp Kewra water, केवड़ा ½ tsp Dry Fenugreek leaves powder, कसूरी मेथी का पाउडर For Jeera Rice 1 tbsp Ghee, घी ½ tsp Cumin seeds, जीरा 2 Green chilli, chopped, हरी मिर्च 2 Garlic cloves, chopped, लहसुन A pinch of asafoetida, हींग 1 cup Cooked rice, पके हुए चावल ½ tbsp Coriander leaves, chopped, धनिया पत्ता Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार 𝗙𝗼𝗿 𝗚𝗮𝗿𝗻𝗶𝘀𝗵 Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता PROCESS 𝗙𝗼𝗿 𝗚𝗿𝗮𝘃𝘆 Heat oil and ghee In a deep bottom pan, add cumin seeds and let it splutter. Add onion and saute for a minute. Add tomatoes, prepared paste and saute well. Onces the tomatoes are soft, add turmeric powder, degi red chilli powder, coriander powder. Saute on medium flame, add curd, cashews and let cook until the row smell goes away. Add a little water and bring it to a boil, add sugar and mix it well. Let it come to room temperature and then grind it into a smooth puree. Strain the gravy and transfer it into a bowl. Keep aside for further use. 𝗙𝗼𝗿 𝗚𝗶𝗻𝗴𝗲𝗿 𝗖𝗵𝗶𝗹𝗹𝗶 𝗣𝗮𝘀𝘁𝗲 In a mortar pestle, add ginger, green chilli, salt to taste and make a paste of it. 𝗙𝗼𝗿 𝗧𝗲𝗺𝗽𝗲𝗿𝗶𝗻𝗴 Heat oil in a deep handi, add ghee, garlic, Carrot, mushroom, cauliflower saute for a minute. Add dry fenugreek leaves powder, cumin powder and mix it well. Add salt to taste, french beans and water let it cook on medium flame. Add prepared gravy and mix well. Add cashewnut, cover it with the lid and cook on medium flame for 5-10 minutes. Once the vegetables are cooked, add coriander leaves, kewra water and mix well. To finish, add dry fenugreek leaves powder and mix well. Finally serve veg diwani handi with jeera rice. 𝗙𝗼𝗿 𝗝𝗲𝗲𝗿𝗮 𝗥𝗶𝗰𝗲 In a deep non-stick pan, add ghee once it's hot, add cumin seeds, let it splutter well. Add garlic cloves and saute until garlic is light brown in color. Add green chilli, asafoetida and cooked rice and saute it well on medium flame. Add coriander leaves. Salt to taste and toss it well. Serve hot with veg diwani handi *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar on your favorite Social Media channels: ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar #MixVegHandi #DiwaniSubzHandi #ranveerbrar #Mixveg #Veghandi #kadhaisabji #Subzhandi #Vegkolhapuri #Jalfrezi #Nawabisabji #Restaurantmixvegsabji #VegSagu #Vegrassa

ingredients: 1 ½ large cup Moong dal, soaked, (मूंग दाल) | 1 ½ tbsp Ghee, (घी) | 1 large Onion, slice, (प्याज़) | 1 tbsp Syah jeera, (शाह जीरा) | Salt to taste, (नमक स्वादानुसार) | 1 tsp Degi red chilli powder, (देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर) | ¼ tsp Coriander powder, (धनिया पाउडर) | 4 cups Water, (पानी) | 1 tbsp Ghee, (घी) | 1 tsp Oil, (तेल) | 3-4 Cloves, ( लॉन्ग) | 1 tsp Syah jeera, (शाह जीरा) | 1 inch Ginger, chopped, (अदरक) | 6 Garlic cloves, chopped/ crushed, (लहसुन) | 2 large Onion, chopped, (प्याज़) | 3-4 Green chilli, chopped, (हरी मिर्च) | ¼ tsp Asafoetida, (हींग) | 1 tsp Degi red chilli powder, (देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर) | 1 tbsp Coriander powder, (धनिया पाउडर) | ½ tsp Turmeric powder, (हल्दी पाउडर) | 2 tbsp Fried onion, (बरिस्ता) | ½ cup Curd, beaten, (दही) | 10-12 Coriander sprig, (धनिया पत्ता) | 4-5 Mint sprig, (पुदीने के पत्ते) | 1 tbsp Fried onion, (बरिस्ता) | 1 small Butter, cube, (मक्खन) | 1 Silver leaf, (optional)
instructions: In a thick bottom sauce pot, add ghee, syah jeera let it splutter. | Add onion and saute on medium flame. | Add soaked moong dal and saute well. | Add salt to taste, degi red chilli powder, coriander powder, water as required. | Cover it with the lid and cook for 20-25 minutes on medium flame. | For Tempering | In a kadai, add ghee, oil, cloves, shay jeera and let it splutter. | Add ginger, garlic and saute well until the garlic turns brown in color. | Add onion, green chilli and saute well. | Add asafoetida, degi red chilli powder, coriander powder. | Add turmeric powder, fried onion, curd and saute on medium flame, until the masalas are cooked properly. | Transfer the cooked moong dal into the tadka and mix well. | Garnish it with coriander sprig, mint sprig, fried onion and butter. | *********************** | For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: | 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid | 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS | *********************** | 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar on your favorite Social Media channels: | ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ | ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ | ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar
raw_text: MOONG DAL MUGHLAI - Perfect Sunday recipe or anyday comfort recipe #MughlaiDal #DalMakhani #Ranveerbrar *********************** 𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡 𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣 🔪Knives I use - https://amzn.to/41Z6eUg 🛒RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer 📟Kitchen Appliances - https://bit.ly/KitchenAppliancesIUse *********************** ⏩𝓢𝓾𝓫𝓼𝓬𝓻𝓲𝓫𝓮 𝓱𝓮𝓻𝓮: https://goo.gl/UE2pmL *********************** 𝗖𝗵𝗲𝗰𝗸 𝗼𝘂𝘁 𝘁𝗵𝗲𝘀𝗲 𝗿𝗲𝗰𝗶𝗽𝗲𝘀 𝘁𝗼𝗼: Dal Tadka & Jeera rice - https://youtu.be/e7A63aezlFw Dal Meat - https://youtu.be/nciyyXrYUkc Dhaba Dal Makhani - https://youtu.be/mA5XjhdwJHc *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App 📲 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** MOONG DAL MUGHLAI Preparation time Over night Cooking time 55 minutes Serving 6 Ingredients 1 ½ large cup Moong dal, soaked, (मूंग दाल) 1 ½ tbsp Ghee, (घी) 1 large Onion, slice, (प्याज़) 1 tbsp Syah jeera, (शाह जीरा) Salt to taste, (नमक स्वादानुसार) 1 tsp Degi red chilli powder, (देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर) ¼ tsp Coriander powder, (धनिया पाउडर) 4 cups Water, (पानी) For Tempering 1 tbsp Ghee, (घी) 1 tsp Oil, (तेल) 3-4 Cloves, ( लॉन्ग) 1 tsp Syah jeera, (शाह जीरा) 1 inch Ginger, chopped, (अदरक) 6 Garlic cloves, chopped/ crushed, (लहसुन) 2 large Onion, chopped, (प्याज़) 3-4 Green chilli, chopped, (हरी मिर्च) ¼ tsp Asafoetida, (हींग) 1 tsp Degi red chilli powder, (देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर) 1 tbsp Coriander powder, (धनिया पाउडर) ½ tsp Turmeric powder, (हल्दी पाउडर) 2 tbsp Fried onion, (बरिस्ता) ½ cup Curd, beaten, (दही) For Garnish 10-12 Coriander sprig, (धनिया पत्ता) 4-5 Mint sprig, (पुदीने के पत्ते) 1 tbsp Fried onion, (बरिस्ता) 1 small Butter, cube, (मक्खन) 1 Silver leaf, (optional) Process In a thick bottom sauce pot, add ghee, syah jeera let it splutter. Add onion and saute on medium flame. Add soaked moong dal and saute well. Add salt to taste, degi red chilli powder, coriander powder, water as required. Cover it with the lid and cook for 20-25 minutes on medium flame. For Tempering In a kadai, add ghee, oil, cloves, shay jeera and let it splutter. Add ginger, garlic and saute well until the garlic turns brown in color. Add onion, green chilli and saute well. Add asafoetida, degi red chilli powder, coriander powder. Add turmeric powder, fried onion, curd and saute on medium flame, until the masalas are cooked properly. Transfer the cooked moong dal into the tadka and mix well. Garnish it with coriander sprig, mint sprig, fried onion and butter. Serve hot. *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar on your favorite Social Media channels: ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar #SabutMoongDal #MoongDal #facebookwatch #Lunch #HomemadeFood #DesiFood #DesiKhana #Desi #ChefRanveerBrar #RanveerBrar #CookWithRB #GharKaKhana #Northindianrecipes #MoongDalRecipes #newrecipe #food #delicious #yummy #quickrecipes #budgetrecipes #indiancuisine #Dalmakhani #Daltadka

For Pizza Toppings In a bowl, add sliced capsicum, onion, tomato, baby corn, bottom mushroom, salt to taste. Add oil and mix everything and set aside. For Potato Pizza In a pan spread the base mixture properly and sprinkle some water then cover and cook on low heat for 5-6 minutes. Now remove the cover and flip the base on the other side. Then spread the tomato ketchup on the upper side and add the cheese then the pizza toppings and some more cheese, chopped green chilli. Cover and let it cool on medium heat until the cheese has melted and the pizza base is crispy. Garnish with coriander sprig and serve hot immediately. *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar on your favorite Social Media channels: ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar #pizza #pizzadough #pizzaontawa #pizzawithoutoven #Noyeastpizza #Pizzawithoutmaida #Wholewheatpizza #binayeastpizza #Pizzasaucekaisebanaen #Pizzabananekividhi #gharpepizza #aloochaat #Tokrichaat #Rosti

raw_text: PANEER LABABDAR - One of those rich and irresistible preparations that one just cannot stop talking about. Do try my recipes for Paneer lababdaar and Lachha Paratha. #PaneerLababdar #LachhaParatha #Ranveerbrar *********************** 𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡 𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣 🔪Knives I use - https://amzn.to/41Z6eUg 🛒RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer 📟Kitchen Appliances - https://bit.ly/KitchenAppliancesIUse *********************** 𝗖𝗵𝗲𝗰𝗸 𝗼𝘂𝘁 𝘁𝗵𝗲𝘀𝗲 𝗿𝗲𝗰𝗶𝗽𝗲𝘀 𝘁𝗼𝗼: https://bit.ly/ParathaRecipesbyRB *********************** PANEER LABABDAR Preparation time 15 minutes Cooking time 25-30 minutes Serving 2-4 Ingredients For Gravy 2 tbsp Oil, तेल 3 Cloves, लॉन्ग 2 Green cardamom, हरी इलायची 6-8 Black pepper cons, काली मिर्च के दाने 2 Bay leaves, तेजपत्ता 1½ Ginger, roughly sliced, अदरक 5-6 Garlic, roughly sliced, लहसुन 3 medium Onion, roughly sliced, प्याज 4 medium Tomatoes, roughly sliced, टमाटर 4 Dry Kashmiri chilli, सूखी कश्मीरी मिर्च 1 tsp Degi Red chilli powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर ¼ tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर 8-10 Cashew nuts, काजू Salt to taste, नमक स्वादानुसार Water as required , पानी For Marination 1 medium Onion, diced, प्याज 1 medium Capsicum, diced, शिमला मिर्च Salt to taste, नमक स्वादानुसार ¼ tsp Degi Red chilli powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर A pinch Garam masala powder, गरम मसाला पाउडर 500 gm Paneer, cubed, पनीर 1 tbsp Oil, तेल 2 tbsp Oil (to saute), भूनने के लिए तेल For Finishing Gravy 2 tbsp Ghee, घी 1 tsp Cumin seeds, जीरा 2 tbsp Garlic, chopped, लहसुन 1 medium Onion, chopped, प्याज 1 medium Tomato, chopped, टमाटर 2 fresh Green chillies, chopped, हरी मिर्च Salt to taste, नमक स्वादानुसार ½ tsp Degi Red chilli powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर 1 tsp Coriander powder, धनिया पाउडर ¼ tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर Prepared Gravy, तैयार की हुई ग्रेवी 2 heaped tbsp Fresh Cream, मलाई ½ tsp Sugar, चीनी ½ tsp Dry Fenugreek leaves powder, कसूरी मेथी का पाउडर For Lachha Paratha 1 cup Refined flour, मैदा 1 cup Whole wheat flour, आटा Salt to taste, नमक स्वादानुसार 1 tsp Oil, तेल Water as required, पानी 1 tsp Ghee, घी ¼ tsp Refined flour, मैदा 1 tbsp Ghee (for roasting), घी For Salt Mixture 1 tbsp Salt, नमक Water, पानी Process For Gravy In a deep bottom pan, add oil, cloves, green cardamom, black peppercorns, bay leaves and let it splutter. Add ginger, garlic, onion and saute it well. Add tomato, bay leaf, dry red chilli, degi red chilli powder, turmeric powder and saute it well. Add cashew nut, salt to taste, add little water and mix well. Cover it with a lid and cook on medium flame until the tomatoes turn soft. Onces the tomatoes are soft, transfer them into a bowl and grind it with the help of a hand blender to a smooth puree. Strain the gravy in another bowl and keep it aside for further use. For Vegetables & Paneer Marination In a bowl, add onion, capsicum, salt to taste, degi red chilli powder, garam masala. Add paneer and toss it well, Add oil and mix everything well. Keep it aside for further use. In a deep non-stick pan, heat oil, onces it's hot, add the marinated paneer mixture into the pan. Toss everything well. For Finishing Gravy In a deep bottom pan, add ghee onces it's hot, add cumin seeds, garlic and saute it well. Add onion and saute it well until light golden in color. Add tomatoes, green chillies and saute for a minute. Add salt to taste, degi red chilli powder, coriander powder, a pinch of turmeric powder. Saute on medium flame until the spices are cooked well. Add a little water and mix it well. Now, add the prepared gravy into the mixture and mix it well. Add fresh cream and mix everything well. Add sugar, add the tossed paneer into the gravy and mix it well. Cook for 2-3 minutes, finish it with dry fenugreek leaves powder and mix it well. Garnished it with fresh cream, coriander sprig and served hot with prepared lacha paratha. For Lacha Paratha In a parat, add refined flour, whole wheat flour, salt to taste, oil, water. Knead a semi soft dough, add a little oil, cover it with a dam cloth and rest for 15 minutes. Firstly, pinch a large sized ball of dough, roll and flatten it. Roll it into a thin circle as of chapathi. roll as thin as possible. Grease the chapati with ghee and sprinkle wheat flour over it. Now start creating pleats by folding with the help of fingers. stretch the pleated dough as much as possible. Begin to roll the pleated dough like a swiss roll. furthermore, secure the end by pressing gently. Rest the roll dough for 10 minutes. In a bowl, add salt, water mix it well Take the rolled ball and dust with some wheat flour and start rolling to a thin circle. Heat a tawa, sprinkle the salt water on hot tawa and place the rolled paratha. After a minute flip off and cook the other side. Once the golden brown spots start appearing on both sides grease with ghee. Furthermore, flip and roast both sides. then crush the paratha to form layers. ***********************

ingredients: 1 cup Tuvar Dal - soaked (तूर दाल) | 1 heaped tbsp Ghee (घी) | Salt to taste (नमक स्वादानुसार) | ½ tsp Turmeric Powder (हल्दी पाउडर) | ¼ tsp Degi Red Chilli Powder (देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर) | 1 Bay Leaf (तेज पत्ता) | 2-3 Kokum (कोकम) | 1 tbsp Jaggery (गुड़) | 1 cup Whole Wheat Flour (गेहूँ का आटा) | 1 tbsp Gram Flour (बेसन) | ½ tsp Turmeric Powder (हल्दी पाउडर) | ½ tsp Degi Red Chilli Powder (देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर) | ¼ tsp Asafoetida (हींग) | Salt to taste (नमक स्वादानुसार) | 1 tbsp Oil (तेल) | 2 tbsp Ghee (घी) | 1 tsp Mustard Seeds (सरसों के बीज) | ¼ tsp Fenugreek Seeds (मेथी दाना) | 1 sprig Curry Leaves (कड़ी पत्ता) | 5-6 Dry Red Chillies (सुखी लाल मिर्च) | 2 Cloves (लॉन्ग) | 1 inch Cinnamon Stick (दालचीनी) | ¼ tsp Asafoetida (हींग) | ½ tsp Degi Red Chilli Powder (देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर) | 3 tbsp Peanut (मूंगफली) | 2 tbsp Ghee (घी)
instructions: In a Kadhi add tuvar dal, ghee, salt, turmeric powder, degi red chilli powder, bay leaf and mix everything properly. | Now cover and cook it on medium heat for 20-25 minutes or until soft. | Now add the cut roti and add kokum, jaggery, let it boil for 8-10 minutes. | Now pour the tempering on it and boil it for a minute. | In a whole wheat flour, gram flour, turmeric powder, degi red chilli powder, asafoetida, salt, oil, water and knead a soft dough and keep aside for 5-10 minutes. | After resting, take a small portion of the dough and roll it into a roti and half cook it on a flat pan. | And then cut it in diamond shape and keep aside for further use. | For Tempering | In a pan add ghee , mustard seeds, fenugreek seeds, curry leaves, dry red chilli, cloves, cinnamon stick, asafoetida, degi red chilli powder and sauté it for a minute. | For Fried Peanut | In a pan add ghee peanuts and fry until light golden brown and then add it in the dal. | *********************** | For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: | 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid | 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS | *********************** | 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar on your favorite Social Media channels: | ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ | ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ | ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar

Now cover and cook it on medium heat for 20-25 minutes or until soft. Now add the cut roti and add kokum, jaggery, let it boil for 8-10 minutes. Now pour the tempering on it and boil it for a minute. Serve hot. For Dhokli In a whole wheat flour, gram flour, turmeric powder, degi red chilli powder, asafoetida, salt, oil, water and knead a soft dough and keep aside for 5-10 minutes. After resting, take a small portion of the dough and roll it into a roti and half cook it on a flat pan. And then cut it in diamond shape and keep aside for further use. For Tempering In a pan add ghee , mustard seeds, fenugreek seeds, curry leaves, dry red chilli, cloves, cinnamon stick, asafoetida, degi red chilli powder and sauté it for a minute. For Fried Peanut In a pan add ghee peanuts and fry until light golden brown and then add it in the dal. *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar on your favorite Social Media channels: ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar #DalDhokli #DalkiDulhan #Ranveerbrar #dalbatichurmarecipe #daldhoklirecipe #daltadka

https://amzn.to/41Z6eUg 🛒RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer 📟Kitchen Appliances - https://bit.ly/KitchenAppliancesIUse *********************** ⏩𝓢𝓾𝓫𝓼𝓬𝓻𝓲𝓫𝓮 𝓱𝓮𝓻𝓮: https://goo.gl/UE2pmL *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App 📲 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** PAV BHAJI RECIPE Preparation time 10 minutes Cooking time 20-25 minutes Serving 2 Ingredients For Bhaji 1 medium size Cauliflower, florets, फूलगोभी 1 Capsicum, roughly chopped, शिमला मिर्च ½ inch Ginger, slice, अदरक 2-3 Garlic, chopped, लहसुन Water, पानी 5 medium Potato, cubed, आलू 1 Carrots, pelled, roughly chopped, गाजर ⅓ cup Green peas, हरी मटर Salt to taste, नमक स्वादानुसार 2-3 tbsp Butter, मक्खन For Tempering 1 cup Onion, chopped, प्याज 1 ½ cup Tomato, chopped, टमाटर 2-3 Green chilli, chopped, हरी मिर्च 2-3 tbsp Butter, मक्खन ¼ cup Oil, तेल ½ tbsp Ginger Garlic paste, अदरक लहसुन का पेस्ट Salt to taste, नमक स्वादानुसार ¼ cup fresh Tomato puree, ताज़े टमाटर की प्यूरी 1 medium Capsicum, chopped, शिमला मिर्च 1 tbsp Degi red chilli powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर 2 tbsp Butter, मक्खन 1 tbsp Prepared pav bhaji masala, तैयार किया हुआ पाव भाजी मसाला Boiled & mashed vegetables, उबली सब्जियाँ 1 tbsp Butter, मक्खन 2 tbsp Prepared pav bhaji masala, तैयार किया हुआ पाव भाजी मसाला Water, पानी ¼ tsp Sugar, चीनी 1 tbsp Coriander leaves, chopped, धनिया पत्ता For Toasting Pav 1 tbsp Butter, मक्खन A pinch of degi red chilli powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर 2 Ladi pav, लादी पाव For Masala Pav 1 tbsp Butter, मक्खन Prepared Masala 2 Ladi pav, लादी पाव For Garnish Onion, chopped, प्याज Lemon wedge, नींबू की फांक Butter pav, बटर पाव Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता Process For Bhaji In a large pot or pressure cooker add cauliflower, capsicum, ginger, garlic, water, potato, carrot, green peas, salt, butter then cover and cook until soft. Now mash everything properly with a masher and set aside. For Tempering In a large tava or a shallow pan heat butter, oil then add onion and saute until translucent. Now add tomatoes, green chillies, ginger garlic paste, salt and saute until they are soft. Add fresh tomato puree and continue cooking for 6-8 minutes. Then add capsicum and continue cooking for another 2 minutes. Once done remove 2-3 tbsp masala aside for further use. Now, add degi red chilli powder, butter, pav bhaji masala and saute for a minute. Now, add boiled & mashed vegetables, butter, pav bhaji masala, water, sugar and continue cooking for another 2-3 minutes. Finish the pav bhaji with fresh coriander leaves and switch off the flames. Serve hot with toasted pav, onion, lemon wedges, coriander leaves. For Toasting Pav In a hot pan add butter degi red chilli powder and coat the pav in that inside out and toast it properly, set aside for further use. For Masala Pav In a hot pan add butter, prepared masala that was kept aside then coat the pav inside out properly and then toast it. Set aside for further use. *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar on your favorite Social Media channels: ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar PavBhaji #Mumbaipavbhaji #Ranveerbrar #Pavbhajirecipe #Easypavbhaji #Pavbhajicookermein #originalpavbhaji #pavbhajimasala #breadpavbhaji #Pavbhajibinapyaaz #Jainpavbhaji #Streetfood #pavbhajirecipeinhindi #Bombaypavbhaji #pavbhajiranveerbrar

title: Mexican Chicken Burrito | रेस्टोरेंट जैसा चिकन रोल मैक्सिकन बरीटो | chicken roll | Chef Ranveer Brar
description: MEXICAN CHICKEN BURRITO - Continuing our Wraps & Rolls series, try my recipe for a spicy Chicken Burrito Wrap. *********************** 𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡 𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣 🔪Knives I use - https://amzn.to/41Z6eUg
ingredients: 2 tbsp Oil (तेल) | 1 tsp Cumin Seeds (जीरा) | 2 fresh Green Chillies - chopped (हरी मिर्च) | 1 medium Onion - chopped (प्याज़) | 1 tsp Coriander Powder (धनिया पाउडर) | ½ tsp Turmeric Powder (हल्दी पाउडर) | 1 tsp Degi Red Chilli Powder (देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर) | 1 cup Curd (दही) | Salt to taste (नमक स्वादानुसार) | ¼ cup Kidney Beans - boiled (राजमा) | 2 tbsp Coriander Leaves (धनिया के पत्ते) | 500 gm Chicken Breast - small cubes (चिकन) | Salt to taste (नमक स्वादानुसार) | 1 tsp Ginger-Garlic Paste (अदरक लहसुन का पेस्ट) | ½ cup Wheat & Refined Flour Dough (गेहूं और मैदे का गुंदा आटा) | 1 medium Onion - chopped (प्याज़) | 1 medium Tomato - chopped (टमाटर) | 2-3 fresh Green Chillies - chopped (हरी मिर्च) | Salt to taste (नमक स्वादानुसार) | 2 tbsp Coriander Leaves - chopped (धनिया पत्ता) | 1 cup cooked Rice (पका हुआ चावल) | 2-3 tbsp Butter - melted (मक्खन) | ½ tsp roasted Cumin Powder (भुना जीरा पाउडर) | 1 tbsp Mayonnaise (optional) (मेयोनीज) | 2-3 tbsp Grated Cheese (चीज़)
instructions: For Marinating Chicken | In a bowl add chicken, salt, ginger-garlic paste, mix everything properly and keep aside for 15-20 minutes. | For Chicken gravy | In a kadai heat oil and add cumin seeds let them crackle then add green chillies, onion and saute until light golden. | Now add coriander powder, turmeric powder, degi red chilli powder and saute until fragrant. | Add the curd mix properly and saute for 2-3 minutes on medium heat. | Now add the marinated chicken, mix it once properly and then add salt, water, kidney beans. | Then cover and cook for 15-20 minutes or until chicken cooked properly. | Remove the lid and finish it with coriander leaves and switch off the flames. | Keep aside for further use. | Take a small portion of the dough and roll it into a thin roti. | Now half cook the roti on a flat pan and keep aside for further use. | In a bowl add chopped, onion, tomato, green chillies, salt, coriander leaves, lemon juice and mix everything properly. | Keep aside for further use. | In a bowl add cooked rice, roasted cumin powder, melted butter and mix everything properly, keep aside for further use. | For Assembling Chicken Burrito Roll | Firstly roast the half cooked roti properly from both sides. | Then place it on a plate and spread some mayonnaise on the lower part of the roti (which is near you). | Now add some rice on the same spot then some chicken with its gravy, some salad, grated cheese. | To roll it properly fold the both sides in and then roll it tightly from the side near to you to the side completely across. | It's ready to be served with some mayonnaise or chutney and nachos. | *********************** | For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: | 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - raw_text: MEXICAN CHICKEN BURRITO - Continuing our Wraps & Rolls series, try my recipe for a spicy Chicken Burrito Wrap. *********************** 𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡 𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣 🔪Knives I use - https://amzn.to/41Z6eUg 🛒RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer 📟Kitchen Appliances - https://bit.ly/KitchenAppliancesIUse *********************** ⏩𝓢𝓾𝓫𝓼𝓬𝓻𝓲𝓫𝓮 𝓱𝓮𝓻𝓮: https://goo.gl/UE2pmL *********************** 𝗖𝗵𝗲𝗰𝗸 𝗼𝘂𝘁 𝘁𝗵𝗲𝘀𝗲 𝗿𝗲𝗰𝗶𝗽𝗲𝘀 𝘁𝗼𝗼: https://bit.ly/ChickenRecipesbyRB *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App 📲 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS MEXICAN CHICKEN BURRITO Preparation time : 15 minutes Cooking time : 25-30 minutes Servings : 2 Ingredients For Chicken gravy 2 tbsp Oil (तेल) 1 tsp Cumin Seeds (जीरा) 2 fresh Green Chillies - chopped (हरी मिर्च) 1 medium Onion - chopped (प्याज़) 1 tsp Coriander Powder (धनिया पाउडर) ½ tsp Turmeric Powder (हल्दी पाउडर) 1 tsp Degi Red Chilli Powder (देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर) 1 cup Curd (दही) Marinated Chicken (मैरिनेटेड चिकन) Salt to taste (नमक स्वादानुसार) Water (पानी) ¼ cup Kidney Beans - boiled (राजमा) 2 tbsp Coriander Leaves (धनिया के पत्ते) For Marinating Chicken 500 gm Chicken Breast - small cubes (चिकन) Salt to taste (नमक स्वादानुसार) 1 tsp Ginger-Garlic Paste (अदरक लहसुन का पेस्ट) For Roti ½ cup Wheat & Refined Flour Dough (गेहूं और मैदे का गुंदा आटा) For Salad 1 medium Onion - chopped (प्याज़) 1 medium Tomato - chopped (टमाटर) 2-3 fresh Green Chillies - chopped (हरी मिर्च) Salt to taste (नमक स्वादानुसार) ½ medium Lemon Juice (नींबू का रस) 2 tbsp Coriander Leaves - chopped (धनिया पत्ता) For Rice 1 cup cooked Rice (पका हुआ चावल) 2-3 tbsp Butter - melted (मक्खन) ½ tsp roasted Cumin Powder (भुना जीरा पाउडर) Other Ingredients 1 tbsp Mayonnaise (optional) (मेयोनीज) 2-3 tbsp Grated Cheese (चीज़) Process For Marinating Chicken In a bowl add chicken, salt, ginger-garlic paste, mix everything properly and keep aside for 15-20 minutes. For Chicken gravy In a kadai heat oil and add cumin seeds let them crackle then add green chillies, onion and saute until light golden. Now add coriander powder, turmeric powder, degi red chilli powder and saute until fragrant. Add the curd mix properly and saute for 2-3 minutes on medium heat. Now add the marinated chicken, mix it once properly and then add salt, water, kidney beans. Then cover and cook for 15-20 minutes or until chicken cooked properly. Remove the lid and finish it with coriander leaves and switch off the flames. Keep aside for further use. For Roti Take a small portion of the dough and roll it into a thin roti. Now half cook the roti on a flat pan and keep aside for further use. For Salad In a bowl add chopped, onion, tomato, green chillies, salt, coriander leaves, lemon juice and mix everything properly. Keep aside for further use. For Rice In a bowl add cooked rice, roasted cumin powder, melted butter and mix everything properly, keep aside for further use. For Assembling Chicken Burrito Roll Firstly roast the half cooked roti properly from both sides. Then place it on a plate and spread some mayonnaise on the lower part of the roti (which is near you). Now add some rice on the same spot then some chicken with its gravy, some salad, grated cheese. To roll it properly fold the both sides in and then roll it tightly from the side near to you to the side completely across. It's ready to be served with some mayonnaise or chutney and nachos. *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar on your favorite Social Media channels: ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar #MexicanBurrito #ChickenBurritoRoll #RanveerBrar #chickenburrito #Mexicanburritobowl #Mexican #Chickenroll #Chickenkathiroll #burritobowl #eggroll #restaurantstylechickenburrito #chickenwrap #nawabikathiroll #Kolkatakathiroll #quesadilla #tacos #nachos

raw_text: HOMEMADE PAV BHAJI MASALA - Before perfecting Pav Bhaji, let's perfect the masala. Nothing quite beats homemade masala right? And Pav Bhaji recipe is now up too - https://youtu.be/wgV9pik8xqc #Pavbhajirecipe #MumbaiPavbhaji #Ranveerbrar 🍽️𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡 𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣 🍽️ RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer Kitchen Appliances - https://bit.ly/KitchenAppliancesIUse Knives I use - https://amzn.to/36VdxoF *********************** ⏩𝓢𝓾𝓫𝓼𝓬𝓻𝓲𝓫𝓮 𝓱𝓮𝓻𝓮: https://goo.gl/UE2pmL *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App 📲 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** PAV BHAJI MASALA (PWD) Pav Bhaji Masala Preparation time 10 minutes Ingredients For Pav Bhaji Masala 30-35 gm Dry red chilli, seedless, सूखी लाल मिर्च 50-55 gm Coriander seeds, धनिया के बीज 15-20 gm Cumin seeds, जीरा 10-15 gm Fennel seeds, सौंफ 10gms Cinnamon stick, दालचीनी 10 gm Black cardamom seeds, बड़ी इलायची 5 gm Bay leaf, तेजपत्ता 10 no Cloves, लॉन्ग 10 gm Black peppercorn, काली मिर्च के दाने 2 no Star anise, चक्र फूल 3-4 no Green cardamom, हरी इलायची 5 gm Salt, नमक स्वादानुसार 5 gm Dry ginger powder, सोंठ पाउडर 10-15 gm Dry mango powder, अमचूर पाउडर 5 gm Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर ½ tsp Asafoetida, हींग ½ Nutmeg, जायफल Process For Pav Bhaji Masala Heat a pan on low heat and add dry red chilli, coriander seeds, cumin seeds, fennel seeds, cinnamon stick, black cardamom seeds, bay leaf, cloves, black peppercorns, Star anise, green cardamom, salt and roast them until fragrant Remove in a bowl then add dry ginger powder, dry mango powder, turmeric powder, asafoetida, nutmeg and let it cool. Then grind it into a powder and sieve it through a medium sieve. Set aside for further use. *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar on your favorite Social Media channels: ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar #mumbaipavbhaji #pavbhajirecipe #pavbhajimasala #homemadepavbhajimasala #everestpavbhaji #pavbhaji #easypavbhaji #pavbhajistreetfood #Streetstylepavbhaji

title: चिकन टिक्का बिना तंदूर | Spicy Chicken Tikka Pulao from scratch | No Tandoor | Chef Ranveer Brar
description: CHICKEN TIKKA TAWA PULAO - Now this is what I call wholesome, Chicken Tikka ka mazaa with Tawa Pulao.. Do try it this weekend. *********************** 𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡 𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣 🔪Knives I use - https://amzn.to/41Z6eUg
ingredients: ½ kg Chicken breast, boneless, cut into medium size, चिकन | Salt to taste, नमक स्वादानुसार | 1 tsp Ginger Garlic paste, अदरक लहसुन का पेस्ट | 10-15 Dry Kashmiri chilli, soaked, सुखी कश्मीरी लाल मिर्च | 2 tbsp Mustard oil, सरसों का तेल | ¼ tsp Black salt, काला नमक | 4 Garlic cloves, लहसुन | 1 tbsp Coriander steam, chopped, धनिए कि डंठल | Salt to taste, नमक स्वादानुसार | 2 tbsp Prepared chilli paste तैयार किया हुआ मिर्च का पेस्ट | ⅓ cup Hung curd, टंगा हुआ दही | ½ tsp Coriander powder, धनिया पाउडर | ¼ tsp Cumin powder, जीरा पाउडर | ¼ tsp Garam masala , गरम मसाला | ½ tsp Degi red chilli powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर | ¼ tsp Dry fenugreek leaves powder, कसूरी मेथी का पाउडर | ½ tbsp Roasted Gram flour, भुने चने का बेसन | 2 tbsp Mustard oil, सरसों का तेल | 1 tbsp Ghee, घी | 2 medium Onion, cut into cube, प्याज | 1 medium size Capsicum, cut into cube, शिमला मिर्च | 1 Tomato, cut into cube seedless, टमाटर | 1 tsp Degi red chilli powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर | ½ tsp Garam masala, गरम मसाला | Salt to taste , नमक स्वादानुसार | 1 tbsp Butter, मक्खन | 1 tbps Prepared red chilli paste, तैयार किया हुआ मिर्च का पेस्ट | Prepared chicken tikka, तैयार किया हुआ चिकन टिक्का | Salt to taste, नमक स्वादानुसार | ¼ tsp Garam masala, गरम मसाला | A pinch of dry fenugreek leaves powder, कसूरी मेथी का पाउडर | 3 cups Cooked rice, पके हुए चावल | 1 tbsp Butter, मक्खन | A pinch of degi red chilli powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर | A pinch of garam masala, गरम मसाला | 1 tsp Saffron water , केसर का पानी | 1 Green chilli, chopped, हरी मिर्च | 2-3 Coal, कोयला | 1 tbsp Butter, मक्खन
instructions: For Chicken Tikka | First Marination | In a bowl, add chicken breast, salt to taste, ginger garlic paste, lemon juice and marinate well and keep it aside for ½ hour. | Paste for Marination | In a bowl, add dry kashmiri chilli, mustard oil, black salt, garlic cloves, ginger, coriander steam, salt to taste. | Transfer it into a grinder jar and grind it into a smooth paste. | Keep it aside for future use. | For Second Marination | In a large bowl, add prepared chilli paste, hung curd, marinated chicken, coriander powder, cumin powder, garam masala, degi red chilli powder, dry fenugreek leaves powder, roasted gram flour and mix everything well and keep it aside for a few minutes. | For Cooking Chicken & Veggies | In a heavy bottom pan or cast iron pan heat mustard oil, ghee and fry the chicken from both the sides until well cooked. | Remove on a plate and keep it aside for further use. | In the same pan, add the vegetables and saute for a minute. | Add degi red chilli powder, garam masala, salt to taste and saute for a minute. | Add a little water and mix it well. | Transfer the vegetables in a bowl and keep it aside for further use. | In a heavy bottom pan, add butter, prepared chilli paste and saute for a minute. | Add little water and boil for a minute. | Add the sauteed vegetables, prepared chicken tikka. | Switch off the flame and Keep a few sauteed vegetables and chicken tikka aside for further use. | Make a well in the centre of the mixture and keep a small steel katori with a few hot charcoal pieces. | Keep a few butter cubes over the coals and cover it with a lid. | Let it sit covered for 8-10 minutes and then remove the cover. | For Chicken Tikka Pulav | Switch on the flames again of the same pan on medium heat then spread the cooked rice properly on it. | Add some butter, degi red chilli powder, garam masala, saffron water, green chilli, fresh coriander leaves and cover and cook it on low heat for 5-8 minutes. | Remove the cover and serve hot Chicken Tikka Pulav. | For Chicken Tikka Pulav Sizzler | Heat a sizzle plate then place some banana leaves on it then add the chicken pulav on it and serve. | ************************* | Serving 2-4 Ingredients: For Chicken Tikka First Marination ½ kg Chicken breast, boneless, cut into medium size, चिकन Salt to taste, नमक स्वादानुसार 1 tsp Ginger Garlic paste, अदरक लहसुन का पेस्ट ½ Lemon juice, नींबू का रस Paste For Marination 10-15 Dry Kashmiri chilli, soaked, सुखी कश्मीरी लाल मिर्च 2 tbsp Mustard oil, सरसों का तेल ¼ tsp Black salt, काला नमक 4 Garlic cloves, लहसुन ½ inch Ginger, slice, अदरक 1 tbsp Coriander steam, chopped, धनिए कि डंठल Salt to taste, नमक स्वादानुसार Second Marination 2 tbsp Prepared chilli paste तैयार किया हुआ मिर्च का पेस्ट ⅓ cup Hung curd, टंगा हुआ दही Marinated chicken, मैरिनेटेड चिकन ½ tsp Coriander powder, धनिया पाउडर ¼ tsp Cumin powder, जीरा पाउडर ¼ tsp Garam masala , गरम मसाला ½ tsp Degi red chilli powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर ¼ tsp Dry fenugreek leaves powder, कसूरी मेथी का पाउडर ½ tbsp Roasted Gram flour, भुने चने का बेसन 2 tbsp Mustard oil, सरसों का तेल 1 tbsp Ghee, घी For Chicken Tikka Pulao 2 medium Onion, cut into cube, प्याज 1 medium size Capsicum, cut into cube, शिमला मिर्च 1 Tomato, cut into cube seedless, टमाटर 1 tsp Degi red chilli powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर ½ tsp Garam masala, गरम मसाला Salt to taste , नमक स्वादानुसार Water, पानी 1 tbsp Butter, मक्खन 1 tbps Prepared red chilli paste, तैयार किया हुआ मिर्च का पेस्ट Water, पानी Sauteed vegetables, भुनी हुई सब्जियां Prepared chicken tikka, तैयार किया हुआ चिकन टिक्का Salt to taste, नमक स्वादानुसार ¼ tsp Garam masala, गरम मसाला A pinch of dry fenugreek leaves powder, कसूरी मेथी का पाउडर 3 cups Cooked rice, पके हुए चावल 1 tbsp Butter, मक्खन A pinch of degi red chilli powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर A pinch of garam masala, गरम मसाला 1 tsp Saffron water , केसर का पानी 1 Green chilli, chopped, हरी मिर्च Few Coriander leaves, roughly torn धनिया पत्ता For Smoking 2-3 Coal, कोयला 1 tbsp Butter, मक्खन For Sizzler Banana leaves, केले के पत्ते Process For Chicken Tikka First Marination In a bowl, add chicken breast, salt to taste, ginger garlic paste, lemon juice and marinate well and keep it aside for ½ hour. Paste for Marination In a bowl, add dry kashmiri chilli, mustard oil, black salt, garlic cloves, ginger, coriander steam, salt to taste. Transfer it into a grinder jar and grind it into a smooth paste. Keep it aside for future use. For Second Marination In a large bowl, add prepared chilli paste, hung curd, marinated chicken, coriander powder, cumin powder, garam masala, degi red chilli powder, dry fenugreek leaves powder, roasted gram flour and mix everything well and keep it aside for a few minutes. For Cooking Chicken & Veggies In a heavy bottom pan or cast iron pan heat mustard oil, ghee and fry the chicken from both the sides until well cooked. Remove on a plate and keep it aside for further use. In the same pan, add the vegetables and saute for a minute. Add degi red chilli powder, garam masala, salt to taste and saute for a minute. Add a little water and mix it well. Transfer the vegetables in a bowl and keep it aside for further use. In a heavy bottom pan, add butter, prepared chilli paste and saute for a minute. Add little water and boil for a minute. Add the sauteed vegetables, prepared chicken tikka. Switch off the flame and Keep a few sauteed vegetables and chicken tikka aside for further use. For Smoking Make a well in the centre of the mixture and keep a small steel katori with a few hot charcoal pieces. Keep a few butter cubes over the coals and cover it with a lid. Let it sit covered for 8-10 minutes and then remove the cover. For Chicken Tikka Pulav Switch on the flames again of the same pan on medium heat then spread the cooked rice properly on it. Add some butter, degi red chilli powder, garam masala, saffron water, green chilli, fresh coriander leaves and cover and cook it on low heat for 5-8 minutes. Remove the cover and serve hot Chicken Tikka Pulav. For Chicken Tikka Pulav Sizzler Heat a sizzle plate then place some banana leaves on it then add the chicken pulav on it and serve. ************************* 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar on your favorite Social Media channels: ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar #ChickenTikka #ChickenPulao #Ranveerbrar

title: चटपटा मसाला ब्रेड उपमा | Masala Bread Upma | Easy Bread Snack | Chef Ranveer Brar
description: MASALA BREAD UPMA - Here's a quick bread snack that you can enjoy any time! And you can improvise it too.. #breadrecipe #snackrecipes #ranveerbrar *********************** 🍽️𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡 𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣 🍽️
ingredients: 2 tbsp Oil (तेल) | 1 tsp Mustard Seeds (सरसों के बीज) | 1 tbsp Gota Urad (गोटा उड़द) | 1 tbsp Chana Dal (चना दाल) | 1 sprig Curry Leaves (कड़ी पत्ता) | 1 inch Ginger - chopped (अदरक) | 2-3 fresh Green or Red Chillies - chopped (हरि या लाल मिर्च) | 2 medium Onions - chopped (प्याज़) | 2 medium Tomatoes - chopped (टमाटर) | ½ tsp Turmeric Powder (हल्दी पाउडर) | ½ tsp Degi Red Chilli Powder (देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर) | 2½ tbsp Curd (दही) | ¾ cup Water (पानी) | Salt to taste (नमक स्वादानुसार) | 9-10 toasted Bread Slices - diced (ब्रेड स्लाइसेज) | 1 heaped tbsp Ghee (घी) | 10-12 Cashew Nuts (काजू) | 2 heaped tbsp Peanuts (मूंगफली)
instructions: In a kadai heat oil and add mustard seeds, gota urad, chana dal and let them crackle. | Now add curry leaves, ginger, green or red chillies, onion and saute until translucent. | Then add tomatoes and cook until they are soft. | Add the turmeric powder, degi red chilli powder , curd and saute on medium heat for a minute. | Now add water, salt and bring it to a boil then add the roasted bread slices, cover it with a lid and let it cook for half a minute then toss it properly until everything is coated completely. | Finish it with fresh coriander leaves and mix everything one last time and serve hot on a serving plate and garnish with fried cashew nuts & peanuts, fresh coriander leaves. | For Fried Nuts | In a small pan heat ghee then add cashew nuts and peanuts fry them until light golden. | Then remove and keep aside for further use. | *********************** | For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: | 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid | 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS | *********************** | 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar on your favorite Social Media channels: | ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ | ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ | ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar

And you can improvise it too.. #breadrecipe #snackrecipes #ranveerbrar *********************** 🍽️𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡 𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣 🍽️ RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer Kitchen Appliances - https://bit.ly/KitchenAppliancesIUse Knives I use - https://amzn.to/36VdxoF *********************** Let's help 𝘽𝙖𝙣𝙙𝙚𝙡 𝘾𝙝𝙚𝙚𝙨𝙚 get its GI Tag 𝗖𝗹𝗶𝗰𝗸 𝗵𝗲𝗿𝗲 𝘁𝗼 𝘀𝗶𝗴𝗻 𝗺𝘆 𝗽𝗲𝘁𝗶𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻 - https://change.org/GITagforBandelCheese ⏩𝓢𝓾𝓫𝓼𝓬𝓻𝓲𝓫𝓮 𝓱𝓮𝓻𝓮: https://goo.gl/UE2pmL *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App 📲 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** MASALA BREAD UPMA Preparation time : 10 minutes Cooking time : 20-25 minutes Servings : 2 Ingredients 2 tbsp Oil (तेल) 1 tsp Mustard Seeds (सरसों के बीज) 1 tbsp Gota Urad (गोटा उड़द) 1 tbsp Chana Dal (चना दाल) 1 sprig Curry Leaves (कड़ी पत्ता) 1 inch Ginger - chopped (अदरक) 2-3 fresh Green or Red Chillies - chopped (हरि या लाल मिर्च) 2 medium Onions - chopped (प्याज़) 2 medium Tomatoes - chopped (टमाटर) ½ tsp Turmeric Powder (हल्दी पाउडर) ½ tsp Degi Red Chilli Powder (देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर) 2½ tbsp Curd (दही) ¾ cup Water (पानी) Salt to taste (नमक स्वादानुसार) 9-10 toasted Bread Slices - diced (ब्रेड स्लाइसेज) fresh Coriander Leaves - roughly torn (ताजा धनिया पत्ता) For Fried Nuts 1 heaped tbsp Ghee (घी) 10-12 Cashew Nuts (काजू) 2 heaped tbsp Peanuts (मूंगफली) For Garnish Fried Cashew Nuts & Peanuts (तले हुए काजू और मूंगफली) fresh Coriander Leaves (ताजा धनिया पत्ता) Process In a kadai heat oil and add mustard seeds, gota urad, chana dal and let them crackle. Now add curry leaves, ginger, green or red chillies, onion and saute until translucent. Then add tomatoes and cook until they are soft. Add the turmeric powder, degi red chilli powder , curd and saute on medium heat for a minute. Now add water, salt and bring it to a boil then add the roasted bread slices, cover it with a lid and let it cook for half a minute then toss it properly until everything is coated completely. Finish it with fresh coriander leaves and mix everything one last time and serve hot on a serving plate and garnish with fried cashew nuts & peanuts, fresh coriander leaves. For Fried Nuts In a small pan heat ghee then add cashew nuts and peanuts fry them until light golden. Then remove and keep aside for further use. *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar on your favorite Social Media channels: ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar #Breadupma #Breadrecipe #Easysnack #Breadpakoda #Upma #Instantupma #Easyupmarecipe

title: शाही मलाई कोफ्ता | Shahi Malai Kofta | लाहोरी मलाई कोफ्ता | नायाब लाहोर का नुस्ख़ा | Chef Ranveer
description: LAHORI MALAI KOFTA - Food knows no boundaries. There are only cuisines that keep changing from region to region, each one a new topic of discovery. Do try this rich preparation and let me know how you like it. *********************** 𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡 𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣 🔪Knives I use - https://amzn.to/41Z6eUg
ingredients: 400 gms Paneer, crumble, पनीर | 1 medium size Potato, boiled, mashed, आलू | ¼ cup Dessicated coconut, नारियल का बुरादा | Salt to taste, नमक स्वादानुसार | ½ tsp Cardamom powder, इलायची पाउडर | ¼ tsp Black pepper powder, काली मिर्च पाउडर | 2 tbsp Raisins, chopped, किशमिश | 5-6 Cashewnut, chopped, काजू | 5-6 Almonds, chopped, बादाम | 2 Green chilli, finely chopped, हरी मिर्च | 2 tbsp Coriander leaves, chopped, धनिया पत्ती | 2 tbsp Paneer & potato mixture, तैयार किया हुआ पनीर और आलू का मिश्रण | Salt to taste, नमक स्वादानुसार | 1 tsp Degi red chilli powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर | ½ tsp Roasted cumin powder, भुना हुआ जीरा पाउडर | 3 heaped tbsp Cashewnut paste, काजू का पेस्ट | 1 tbsp Ginger Garlic paste, अदरक लहसुन का पेस्ट | 2 tbsp Oil, तेल | 3 tbsp Ghee, घी | ½ tsp Cumin seeds, जीरा | ¼ tsp Fennel seeds, सौंफ | 2 Cloves, लॉन्ग | 1 Green cardamom, हरी इलायची | 2 large Onion, chopped, प्याज | Prepared cashew nut mixture, तैयार किया हुआ काजू का मिश्रण | 2 tbsp Curd, beaten, दही | ½ tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर | 1 tbsp Coriander powder, धनिया पाउडर | 1 tbsp Degi red chilli powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर | 1 cup fresh Tomato puree, ताज़े टमाटर की प्यूरी | Salt to taste, नमक स्वादानुसार
instructions: In a large bowl, add crumble paneer, potato and mashed it properly. | Add desiccated coconut, salt to taste, cardamom powder, black pepper powder mix everything well and make a smooth mixture. | Divide mixture into 6-8 equal portions. | Give each portion the shape of a ball. | Take one ball and press a little between your palm and flatten it like a pattie. | Stuff the fulling in the center and wrap them in from all the sides and give a round shape ball. | Prepare the remaining kofta as well. | Heat oil in a kadai. | Onces it's hot, slide 3-4 balls and deep fry on medium hot oil. | Fry until light golden in color and crisp from all the sides. | Drain on absorbent paper and set aside for further use. | For Stuffing | In a bowl, add raisins, cashewnut, almonds, green chilli, ginger, coriander leaves, prepared paneer & potato mixture, salt to taste, degi red chilli powder, roasted cumin powder, lemon juice, mix everything well and keep aside for further use. | For Cashew Nut Mixture | In a bowl, add cashew nut paste, ginger garlic paste, oil and mix it well. | Keep it aside for further use. | Heat ghee in a kadai, add cumin seeds, fennel seeds, cloves, and green cardamom. | Add onion and saute on medium flame until light golden in colour and soft in texture. | Add prepared cashew nut mixture and keep sauting on medium flame. | Add curd, turmeric powder, coriander powder, degi red chilli powder and saute it well. | Add fresh tomato puree and cook on medium flame until oil starts to separate. | Add salt to taste, little water and cook for 5-7 minutes. | Add koftas and mix gently. | Cook on simmer for 1 minute. | Transfer in a serving bowl. | Garnish with curd and coriander sprig. | *********************** | For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: | 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 -
