https://youtu.be/ml5onhmg1G0 *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App 📲 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** LAHORI STYLE MALAI KOFTA Preparation time 10 minutes Cooking time 20-25 minutes Serving 2 Ingredients 400 gms Paneer, crumble, पनीर 1 medium size Potato, boiled, mashed, आलू ¼ cup Dessicated coconut, नारियल का बुरादा Salt to taste, नमक स्वादानुसार ½ tsp Cardamom powder, इलायची पाउडर ¼ tsp Black pepper powder, काली मिर्च पाउडर Oil for frying, तलने के लिए तेल For Stuffing 2 tbsp Raisins, chopped, किशमिश 5-6 Cashewnut, chopped, काजू 5-6 Almonds, chopped, बादाम 2 Green chilli, finely chopped, हरी मिर्च ½ inch Ginger, chopped, अदरक 2 tbsp Coriander leaves, chopped, धनिया पत्ती 2 tbsp Paneer & potato mixture, तैयार किया हुआ पनीर और आलू का मिश्रण Salt to taste, नमक स्वादानुसार 1 tsp Degi red chilli powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर ½ tsp Roasted cumin powder, भुना हुआ जीरा पाउडर ½ Lemon juice, नींबू का रस For Cashew Nut Mixture 3 heaped tbsp Cashewnut paste, काजू का पेस्ट 1 tbsp Ginger Garlic paste, अदरक लहसुन का पेस्ट 2 tbsp Oil, तेल For Gravy 3 tbsp Ghee, घी ½ tsp Cumin seeds, जीरा ¼ tsp Fennel seeds, सौंफ 2 Cloves, लॉन्ग 1 Green cardamom, हरी इलायची 2 large Onion, chopped, प्याज Prepared cashew nut mixture, तैयार किया हुआ काजू का मिश्रण 2 tbsp Curd, beaten, दही ½ tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर 1 tbsp Coriander powder, धनिया पाउडर 1 tbsp Degi red chilli powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर 1 cup fresh Tomato puree, ताज़े टमाटर की प्यूरी Salt to taste, नमक स्वादानुसार Water, पानी For Garnish Curd, beaten, दही Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ती Process In a large bowl, add crumble paneer, potato and mashed it properly. Add desiccated coconut, salt to taste, cardamom powder, black pepper powder mix everything well and make a smooth mixture. Divide mixture into 6-8 equal portions. Give each portion the shape of a ball. Take one ball and press a little between your palm and flatten it like a pattie. Stuff the fulling in the center and wrap them in from all the sides and give a round shape ball. Prepare the remaining kofta as well. Heat oil in a kadai. Onces it's hot, slide 3-4 balls and deep fry on medium hot oil. Fry until light golden in color and crisp from all the sides. Drain on absorbent paper and set aside for further use. For Stuffing In a bowl, add raisins, cashewnut, almonds, green chilli, ginger, coriander leaves, prepared paneer & potato mixture, salt to taste, degi red chilli powder, roasted cumin powder, lemon juice, mix everything well and keep aside for further use. For Cashew Nut Mixture In a bowl, add cashew nut paste, ginger garlic paste, oil and mix it well. Keep it aside for further use. For Gravy Heat ghee in a kadai, add cumin seeds, fennel seeds, cloves, and green cardamom. Add onion and saute on medium flame until light golden in colour and soft in texture. Add prepared cashew nut mixture and keep sauting on medium flame. Add curd, turmeric powder, coriander powder, degi red chilli powder and saute it well. Add fresh tomato puree and cook on medium flame until oil starts to separate. Add salt to taste, little water and cook for 5-7 minutes. Add koftas and mix gently. Cook on simmer for 1 minute. Transfer in a serving bowl. Garnish with curd and coriander sprig. Serve hot. *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar on your favorite Social Media channels: ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar #MalaiKofta #Koftarecipe #RanveerBrar #malaikofta #shahikofta #paneerkofta #malaikoftakaisebanatehain #malaikoftaeasyrecipe #Malaikoftatips #Shotoniphone12pro

ingredients: 10-12 Baby Corns - cut in half (बेबी कॉर्न) | Salt to taste (नमक स्वादानुसार) | ½ tsp Sugar (चीनी) | Salt to taste (नमक स्वादानुसार) | ½ tsp Black Pepper Powder (काली मिर्च का पाउडर) | 1 tbsp Refined Flour (मैदा) | 3 tbsp Corn-Starch (कॉर्न स्टार्च) | 1½ tbsp Oil (तेल) | 1 inch Ginger - chopped (अदरक) | 1-2 cloves Garlic - chopped (लहसुन) | 1 small Onion - chopped (प्याज़) | 4 fresh Green Chillies - cut in 1 inch pieces (हरी मिर्च) | 2 tbsp tender Coriander Stem - chopped (धनिया के डंठल) | Salt to taste (नमक स्वादानुसार) | ½ tsp Black Pepper Powder (काली मिर्च का पाउडर) | ¼ tsp Powdered Sugar (पिसी हुई चीनी)
instructions: For Blanching Baby Corn | In a pot boil water and add salt, sugar in it then add the baby corn's. | Blanch them in boiling water for 5-6 minutes or until half done. | Remove and add in a bowl for further use. | For Frying Baby Corn | In the bowl with hot blanched baby corn's add salt, black pepper powder, refined flour, corn-starch and mix it properly ensuring that it coat's everything. | Now deep fry them in medium hot oil until light golden. | Keep aside for further use. | For Tempering | In a wok heat oil and add ginger, garlic, onion and saute until translucent then add green chillies, tender coriander stem and saute for 2-3 minutes. | Meanwhile deep fry the baby corn's second time in hot oil until golden brown and crispy. | Now add the fried baby corn, salt, black pepper powder, powdered sugar and toss it properly ensuring that it coat's everything properly. | Cook it for another minute and finish it with spring onion and coriander leaves. | Serve hot and immediately. | *********************** | For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: | 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid | 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS | *********************** | 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar on your favorite Social Media channels: | ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ | ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ | ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar

Keep aside for further use. For Masala In a non-stick pan, add coriander seeds, black peppercorns, cloves, big cardamom, green cardamom, shahi jeera. Dry roast on low flame until the spices turn aromatic. Transfer it into a grinder jar and grind it into a fine powder. Keep it aside for further use. Add little water, seared chicken and cook on medium flame for 4-5minutes. Add curd, prepared masala, coriander leaves and mix everything well. Onces the chicken is nicely cooked, serve hot with roti. title: Spicy Gobi 65 roll | गोभी 65 काठी रोल | Restaurant style recipe Malabar Parotta | Chef Ranveer Brar
description: GOBI 65 ROLL - After my last visit to Buhari hotel in Chennai, I was so inspired by the '65' range of dishes that I had to make this. Do try this spicy snack. Kripsy and wholesome :) *********************** 𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡 𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣 🔪Knives I use - https://amzn.to/41Z6eUg
ingredients: 1 small Cauliflower - cut in small florets (फूलगोभी) | 1 tsp Ginger-Garlic paste (अदरक लहसुन का पेस्ट) | Salt to taste (नमक स्वादानुसार) | 2 tbsp Corn-starch (कॉर्न स्टार्च) | 2 tbsp Refined flour (मैदा) | ½ tsp Degi red chilli powder (देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर) | 2 tbsp Curd (दही) | 2 tbsp Oil तेल | 1 tsp Mustard seeds (सरसों के बीज) | 1 inch Ginger - sliced (अदरक) | 2-3 cloves Garlic - sliced (लहसुन) | 2 fresh Green chillies - broken in half (हरी मिर्च) | 1 sprig Curry leaves (कड़ी पत्ता) | Salt to taste (नमक स्वादानुसार) | 2 tbsp Tomato ketchup (टाॅमेटो केचप) | ½ tsp Degi red chilli powder (देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर) | ¼ tsp Black pepper powder (काली मिर्च का पाउडर) | 2 tbsp Coriander leaves - roughly torn (धनिया पत्ता) | 1 cup Refined flour soft dough (मैदे का गुंदा हुआ आटा) | 1 tbsp Oil (तेल) | Salt to taste (नमक स्वादानुसार) | ½ tsp Refined flour (मैदा) | 1 tbsp Ghee (घी) | 1 tbsp Hung Curd (टंगा हुआ दही)

Kripsy and wholesome :) *********************** 𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡 𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣 🔪Knives I use - https://amzn.to/41Z6eUg 🛒RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer 📟Kitchen Appliances - https://bit.ly/KitchenAppliancesIUse *********************** Let's help 𝘽𝙖𝙣𝙙𝙚𝙡 𝘾𝙝𝙚𝙚𝙨𝙚 get its GI Tag 𝗖𝗹𝗶𝗰𝗸 𝗵𝗲𝗿𝗲 𝘁𝗼 𝘀𝗶𝗴𝗻 𝗺𝘆 𝗽𝗲𝘁𝗶𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻 - https://change.org/GITagforBandelCheese *********************** ⏩𝓒𝓵𝓲𝓬𝓴 𝓽𝓸 𝓢𝓾𝓫𝓼𝓬𝓻𝓲𝓫𝓮 : https://goo.gl/UE2pmL *********************** 𝗖𝗵𝗲𝗰𝗸 𝗼𝘂𝘁 𝘁𝗵𝗲𝘀𝗲 𝗿𝗲𝗰𝗶𝗽𝗲𝘀 𝘁𝗼𝗼: https://bit.ly/RollsnWrapsbyRB *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App 📲 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** GOBI 65 ROLL Preparation time 15 minutes Cooking time 20-25 minutes Serving 2 Ingredients For Frying Gobi 1 small Cauliflower - cut in small florets (फूलगोभी) 1 tsp Ginger-Garlic paste (अदरक लहसुन का पेस्ट) Salt to taste (नमक स्वादानुसार) 2 tbsp Corn-starch (कॉर्न स्टार्च) 2 tbsp Refined flour (मैदा) ½ tsp Degi red chilli powder (देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर) 2 tbsp Curd (दही) Water (पानी) Oil for frying (तेल तलने के लिए) For Tempering 2 tbsp Oil तेल 1 tsp Mustard seeds (सरसों के बीज) 1 inch Ginger - sliced (अदरक) 2-3 cloves Garlic - sliced (लहसुन) 2 fresh Green chillies - broken in half (हरी मिर्च) 1 sprig Curry leaves (कड़ी पत्ता) Salt to taste (नमक स्वादानुसार) 2 tbsp Tomato ketchup (टाॅमेटो केचप) ½ tsp Degi red chilli powder (देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर) ¼ tsp Black pepper powder (काली मिर्च का पाउडर) Fried Gobi (तली हुई फूलगोभी) 2 tbsp Coriander leaves - roughly torn (धनिया पत्ता) For Paratha 1 cup Refined flour soft dough (मैदे का गुंदा हुआ आटा) 1 tbsp Oil (तेल) Salt to taste (नमक स्वादानुसार) ½ tsp Refined flour (मैदा) 1 tbsp Ghee (घी) Other Ingredients 1 tbsp Hung Curd (टंगा हुआ दही) Onion & Tomato - sliced (प्याज और टमाटर) Fresh Coriander leaves (धनिया पत्ता) Process For Frying Gobi In a bowl add cauliflower, ginger garlic-ginger paste, salt, corn-starch, refined flour, degi red chilli powder, curd, water and mix everything until it coat's the cauliflower properly. Now deep fry then in medium hot oil until golden brown and crispy. Remove and keep aside for further use. For Tempering In a kadai heat oil and add mustard seeds, ginger, garlic, green chillies, curry leaves, salt, tomato ketchup, degi red chilli powder black pepper powder and saute for a minute. Then add fried gobi and toss it until it costs the gobi properly, now finish it with coriander leaves and keep aside for further use. For Paratha Take a portion from the refined flour dough and roll it as thin as possible, now apply oil, salt, some refined flour and fold it like a fan. Then roll it for one end to another and tuck in the last part in so it does not open. Repeat this process with the rest of the dough and keep aside covered by a wet cloth for 5 minutes. After resting, roll it into a roti and roast it on a hot flat pan. Once half cooked apply some oil and cook it from both sides until golden brown. Keep aside for further use. For Assembling Gobi 65 Rolls Take one paratha and apply hung curd on the lower part then place the fried gobi, sliced tomato & onion, fresh Coriander leaves and then roll it up. Serve immediately. *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar on your favorite Social Media channels: ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar Gobi65 #Lachhaparatha #Ranveerbrar #Gobi65 #Gobiparatha #Kathiroll #Gobimanchurian #Gobimanchuriandry #Lachhaparatha #Malabarparatha #Vegwrap #burritto

title: Basic Onion Tomato Masala | एक मसाले से बनाएँ कई डिश | Dal Tadka | shortcut Gravy | Chef Ranveer
description: ONION TOMATO GRAVY - Once you get the basic gravy right, you can make any dish easily. Let's break down the basics of a basic Onion Tomato gravy and give a quick twist to a simple Dal as well. *********************** 𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡 𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣 🔪Knives I use - https://amzn.to/41Z6eUg
ingredients: ¾-1 cup Oil (तेल) | 1 tsp Cumin Seeds (जीरा) | 4-5 medium Onions - chopped (प्याज़) | 2 tsp Degi Red Chilli Powder (देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर) | 1 tsp Turmeric Powder (हल्दी पाउडर) | 3 tsp Coriander Powder (धनिया पाउडर) | 1 tbsp Ginger-Garlic Paste (अदरक लहसुन का पेस्ट) | 3-4 medium Pureed Tomatoes (प्यूरीड टाॅमेटो) | Salt to taste (नमक स्वादानुसार) | 1 medium Tomato - chopped (टमाटर) | ½ tsp Vinegar (सिरका) | ½ cup Cooked Dal (पकी हुई दाल) | 1 heaped tbsp Onion Tomato Gravy (प्याज़ टमाटर की ग्रेवी) | 1 tbsp Coriander Leaves - chopped (धनिया पत्ता)
instructions: For Onion Tomato Gravy | In a kadai heat oil and add cumin seeds, chopped onions saute them until golden brown and cook completely. | Now add degi red chilli powder, turmeric powder, coriander powder, ginger-garlic paste and keep on sauteing until fragrant. | Then add the tomato puree, chopped tomato, salt and cook on medium heat until properly cooked. | Finish by adding vinegar then cook it for a minute and switch off the flames. | Cool it down and store in an airtight container in the fridge. | In a hot kadai add cooked dal, water, onion tomato gravy and mix it properly then boil it for 2 minutes. | Now add coriander leaves, stir it once and continue boiling for a minute. | Switch off the flames and dal is ready to serve. | *********************** | For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: | 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid | 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS | *********************** | 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar on your favorite Social Media channels: | ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ | ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ | ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar

Now add degi red chilli powder, turmeric powder, coriander powder, ginger-garlic paste and keep on sauteing until fragrant. Then add the tomato puree, chopped tomato, salt and cook on medium heat until properly cooked. Finish by adding vinegar then cook it for a minute and switch off the flames. Cool it down and store in an airtight container in the fridge. For Dal In a hot kadai add cooked dal, water, onion tomato gravy and mix it properly then boil it for 2 minutes. Now add coriander leaves, stir it once and continue boiling for a minute. Switch off the flames and dal is ready to serve. *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar on your favorite Social Media channels: ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar #OnionTomatoGravy #Howtomakegravy #Ranveerbrar #gravy #oniontomatogravy #howtomakegravy #gravybasics #basicgravy #indiancurry #chickenmasala #matarpaneer #alumatar #hostelrecipes #quickrecipes #Indiancookingbasics

title: Kolkata Style Chicken Biryani | आलू वाला कोलकाता चिकन बिरयानी | Chef Ranveer Brar
description: KOLKATA STYLE CHICKEN BIRYANI - There are Biryani recipes and then there's the Kolkata style Biryani. Let's build up this Chicken Biryani step by step. Ready? Let's go. *********************** 𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡 𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣 🔪Knives I use - https://amzn.to/41Z6eUg
ingredients: 2 medium Potatoes, cut in half , आलू | 1 cup Saffron water / Yellow colour , केसर का पानी या पीला रंग | 500-750 gm Chicken, curry cut , चिकन | 4-5 tbsp Curd , दही | 1 tsp Ghee , घी | 1 tbsp Ginger-Garlic paste, अदरक लहसुन का पेस्ट | 1 tsp Degi red chilli powder , देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर | ¼ tsp Turmeric powder , हल्दी पाउडर | 1 tsp Coriander powder , धनिया पाउडर | ¼ cup Fried onion , तला हुआ प्याज | 1 fresh Green chilli , हरी मिर्च | Salt to taste , नमक स्वादानुसार | ¼ cup Oil , तेल | 3 Green cardamom , हरी इलायची | 1 Maze , जावित्री | 3 Hard-Boiled eggs , उबले हुए अंडे | 1 tbsp Shahi jeera , शाही जीरा | 2 tbsp Black peppercorns , काली मिर्च के दाने | 8-10 Green cardamom, हरी इलायची | 1 Black cardamom , बड़ी इलायची | 2 Maze , जावित्री | 4-5 Cloves , लॉन्ग | 2 inch Cinnamon stick , दालचीनी | ½ tsp Fennel seeds , सोंफ | 1 medium Onion, sliced , प्याज | Salt to taste , नमक स्वादानुसार | 1 inch Cinnamon stick , दालचीनी | ½ tsp Fennel seeds , सॉफ | 2-3 Green cardamom , हरि इलायची | 1 Black cardamom, बड़ी इलायची | 1 Star anise , चकरी फूल | 6-8 Black peppercorns , काली मिर्च के दाने | 1 Bay leaf , तेजपत्ता | 3 cups Basmati rice, soaked for 20 minutes , बासमती चावल | 2 tbsp Fresh Cream , मलाई | 1 tbsp Fried onion | 1 tsp Prepared Biryani masala | 2 tbsp Gravy (yakhni) | 1 tsp Kewra water | Prepared Biryani masala | ¾ cup Gravy (yakhni) | Dried Prunes (आलूबुख़ारे ) 5-6 no’s to add while dum | Meetha itr (मीठा इत्र ) 1 -2 drops to finish
instructions: For Yellow Potato | Add saffron water or yellow water in a bowl, add cut potatoes & keep it for a minute. | For Marinating Chicken | In a bowl, marinate the chicken with curd, ghee, ginger garlic paste, degi red chilli powder, turmeric powder & coriander powder. | Add fried onion, green chilli, salt to taste & mix well until the chicken is well-coated with the marinade. | Rest for 10 minutes or 1 hour. | For Frying Potato & Egg | In a non-stick pan, heat oil, add green cardamom, maze, soaked potatoes & hard-boiled egg, fry on low flame for 2-3 minutes. | Take out the egg in a different bowl & keep aside for further use. | Fry the potatoes until crisp and golden in color. | For Biryani Masala | In a pan, add shahi jeera, black peppercorns, green cardamom, black cardamom, mace, cloves, cinnamon stick, fennel stick, nutmeg & dry roast until fragrant. | Remove and let it cool down & grind it into a fine powder. | For Cooking Chicken | In a large pot, add remaining oil, add onion & saute on medium flame until light golden in color. | Add marinated chicken & saute for 4-5 mins. | Add fried potatoes & saute again. | Add water & stir well. | Cover-cook on medium flame until the chicken is 80% cooked. | Remove the chicken & potatoes from the yakhni & keep aside. | Strain the yakhni in a bowl & keep it aside for further use. | For Boiled Rice | Boil water in a sauce pot,add salt to taste. | Take a muslin cloth, add cinnamon stick, fennel seeds, green cardamom, black cardamom, star anise and black peppercorns, tie a knot & make a potli of it. | Add the spice potli into the hot boiling water. | Add soaked basmati rice & let cook on medium heat until 70% cooked. | Once done, strain the rice and keep aside for further use. | For Richness | In a bowl, add fresh cream, fried onion, biryani masala, prepared yakhni and mix well. | Add kewra water & mix again. | For Layering | Keep a heavy bottom pan. | In a large pot, add the cooked chicken, potatoes, prepared yakni & fried onion. | Add the boiled rice and layer it evenly. | Pour the saffron water. | Layer it with fried onion, sprinkle some biryani masala. | Cover it with a lid and dum-cook for 15-20 minutes. | *********************** | For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: | 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid | 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS | *********************** | 🌎 Add the spice potli into the hot boiling water. Add soaked basmati rice & let cook on medium heat until 70% cooked. Once done, strain the rice and keep aside for further use. title: White Dhokla / Idara | खट्टा ढोकला बनाने का आसान तरीका | सूरती ईदड़ा | Chef Ranveer Brar
description: 𝗞𝗛𝗔𝗧𝗧𝗔 𝗗𝗛𝗢𝗞𝗟𝗔 📲Share to Whatsapp/Signal/Telegram - https://youtu.be/Vm2nwo8UhJ4 Steamed snacks are super healthy, especially during Monsoon and change of seasons. Try my easy recipe for Khatta Safed Dhokla and let me know how you like it. *********************** 𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡 𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣
ingredients: 1 cup Kolum Rice - soaked (कोलम चावल) | ½ cup Split Black Gram - soaked (उड़द दाल) | ½ cup Sour Curd (खट्टा दही) | ¼ cup Coconut water (नारियल का पानी) | Salt to taste (नमक स्वादानुसार) | ½ tsp fresh Green Chilli Paste (हरी मिर्च का पेस्ट) | 1½ tbsp Oil (तेल) | ½ tsp Fruit Salt (फ्रुट साॅल्ट या मीठा सोडा) | 2 tbsp Oil (तेल) | 1 tsp Mustard Seeds (सरसों के बीज) | 2-3 Dry Red Chillies (सूखी लाल मिर्च) | 1 sprig Curry Leaves (कड़ी पत्ता)
instructions: For Fermentation | In a grinder jar add soaked rice, split black gram, sour curd and grind it into a proper paste. | Remove in a bowl and keep in a warm place to ferment for 4-5 hours. | After fermented, add coconut water, salt, green chilli paste, mix it properly. | Now take one portion of the batter and add mixture of oil, fruit salt in itvand mix it properly with light hands. | Switch on the steamer, and also grease the mould or the plate then pour the batter in it and steam it for 10-12 minutes on high heat. | Once steamed remove and let it cool a little, then cut in the desired shape and pour the hot tempering on it and serve warm. | For Tempering | In a small pan heat oil and add mustard seeds, dry red chillies, curry leaves, saute for a minute and it ready to use. | *********************** | For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: | 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid | 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS | *********************** | 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar on your favorite Social Media channels: | ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ | ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ | ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar

title: Masala Sandwich no bread | बिना ब्रेड के बनाएं झटपट मसाला सैंडविच | Chef Ranveer Brar
description: MASALA SANDWICH WITHOUT BREAD 📲Share to Whatsapp/Signal/Telegram - https://youtu.be/e0u3AfOZbWY *********************** 🍽️𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡 𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣 🍽️ RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer

raw_text: MASALA SANDWICH WITHOUT BREAD 📲Share to Whatsapp/Signal/Telegram - https://youtu.be/e0u3AfOZbWY *********************** 🍽️𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡 𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣 🍽️ RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer Kitchen Appliances - https://bit.ly/KitchenAppliancesIUse Knives I use - https://amzn.to/36VdxoF *********************** 𝗖𝗹𝗶𝗰𝗸 𝗵𝗲𝗿𝗲 𝘁𝗼 𝘀𝗶𝗴𝗻 𝗺𝘆 𝗽𝗲𝘁𝗶𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻 - https://change.org/GITagforBandelCheese *********************** ⏩𝓢𝓾𝓫𝓼𝓬𝓻𝓲𝓫𝓮 𝓱𝓮𝓻𝓮: https://goo.gl/UE2pmL *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App 📲 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** NO BREAD MASALA SANDWICH Preparation time 10 minutes Cooking time 20-25 minutes Serving 2 Ingredients For Batter 2 ½ cups Gram flour, बेसन 1 tbsp Oil, तेल Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार ¼ tsp Sugar, चीनी ½ inch Ginger, grated, अदरक 2 tbsp Semolina, soaked in water, पानी में भीगा हुआ रवा Water, पानी 3 tbsp Curd, beaten, दही ½ tsp Saffron water, केसर का पानी ½ tsp Fruit salt, फ्रूट साल्ट 1 tsp Oil, तेल Oil for frying, तेल For Filling 2 Green chilli, chopped, हरी मिर्च ½ inch Ginger, chopped, अदरक ½ Capsicum, chopped, शिमला मिर्च 2 tbsp Sweet corn kernels, blanched, भुट्टे के दाने ½ medium Carrot, chopped, गाजर 1 Potato, boiled, grated, आलू ½ cup Pizza cheese, cubed, पिज़्ज़ा चीज 2 tbsp Coriander leaves, chopped, धनिया पत्ता Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार 1 tbsp Butter, मक्खन 1 tsp Chilli flakes, चिल्ली फ्लेक्स 1 tsp roasted Cumin powder, जीरा पाउडर For Spread 2 tbsp Mayonnaise , मायोनिज 2 tbsp Mint chutney ,पुदीना चटनी Other Ingredients 1 tbsp Cumin seeds, जीरा Butter for frying , मक्खन For Garnish fresh Mint leaves, पुदीना पता Tomato, wedge, टमाटर Process For Batter In a large bowl, add gram flour, oil, salt to taste, sugar, ginger, soaked semolina, water, curd and mix it well. In another bowl, add fruit salt, oil and mix it well. Pour it into a batter and mix everything well. Now heat a non-stick pan and a ladle full of the batter and cook it until light golden brown on low heat. Cover it with a lid and cook for 3 minutes. Then flip it on the other side and cook until it's lightly crusted. Repeat this process with the rest of the batter. And let them cool down a little. Then take the cake, keep the light golden color part inside and spread the mayonnaise and mint chutney evenly on it. Add the prepared filling and then place another cake on it and press a little. In a nonstick pan, add butter and fry the sandwich from both the sides on low flame. Cover it with a lid and cook until nice crisp, cut into half. Garnishe it with mint leaves and tomato wedges and serve hot. For Filling In a bowl, add green chilli, ginger, capsicum, sweet corn, carrot, potato and mix everything well. Add pizza cheese, coriander leaves, salt to taste, butter, chilli flakes mix it well and keep aside for further use. Add the prepared cumin powder and mix it well. For Cumin Powder In a pan, add cumin seeds and roast it on a low flame until they are slightly browned and very fragrant. With the help of a rolling pin crushed it into a fine powder. Keep aside for further use. Or Store it in an airtight container. *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar on your favorite Social Media channels: ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar #masalatoast #breadOmelette #spicybreadsandwich #sandwichfilling #aloosandwich #bombaytoastchutney #sandwichrecipe #masalasandwich #masalasandwichchutney #sandwichrecipe #streetfood

title: No Bake Cheesecake | quick Pull Me Up cake | चीज़केक बनाने की आसान विधि । Chef Ranveer Brar
description: NO BAKE CHEESECAKE - Some recipes are trends and some everyone's favourite. And some, qualify as both :) A good no-bake Cheesecake is a perfect example. Do try my recipe.. #Cheesecake #Pullupcake #Ranveerbrar *********************** 🍽️𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡 𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣 🍽️
ingredients: 1 cup Cream cheese, क्रीम चीज़ | 1 cup Hung curd, टंगा हुआ दही | 1 cup Whipping cream, विपिग क्रीम | ½ cup Sugar, चीनी | ¼ tsp Lemon zest, लेमन जेस्ट | 6 gms Agar agar, soaked in 4 tbsp water, अगर अगर | ⅓ cup Strawberry puree , स्ट्रॉबेरी प्यूरी | 1 ½ cup Biscuits, crumbs, बिस्कुट | ¼ cup Butter, मक्खन
instructions: In a large bowl, add cream cheese, hung curd, whipping cream and half the sugar. | Using an electric blender set at medium-high speed, beat the cream cheese in a large bowl until smooth. | Add a little lemon zest and mix it well. | In a bowl, add agar agar and little water and soaked in it for 5 minutes. | In a large pan, add little water, soaked agar agar and mix it well. | Add sugar and mix it well. | Then add strawberry puree then switch off the flame and mix everything well. | Transfer this into a bowl, let it come to a room temperature. | Once the strawberry puree mixture is at normal temperature pour it into a cream cheese mixture and mix it well. | Pour the cream cheese mixture over the biscuit crust; smooth the top with a rubber spatula. and refrigerate until firm,1 to 1 ½ hours. | Take the cake out from the refrigerator and place on a cooling rack. | Once set, Place the ohp sheet in the center. | Pour the melted chocolate in the center over the cheesecake. | Cover it from all the sides evenly. | Garnished it with dragon fruit, fresh mint leaves, cocoa powder, icing sugar and pomegranate pearls. | Cut it into a slice and serve. | In a bowl, add biscuits and crush them with a rolling pin or hands. | In a nonstick pan, add butter and let it melt completely. | Add biscuits crumbs and mix well until all the crumbs are nicely coated. | Press the crumb mixture into a cake tin, spreading evenly all the side; press flat. | Chill crust in freezer for at least 10 minutes. | *********************** | For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: | 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid | 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS | *********************** | 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar on your favorite Social Media channels: | ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ | ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ | ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar
raw_text: NO BAKE CHEESECAKE - Some recipes are trends and some everyone's favourite. And some, qualify as both :) A good no-bake Cheesecake is a perfect example. Do try my recipe.. #Cheesecake #Pullupcake #Ranveerbrar *********************** 🍽️𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡 𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣 🍽️ RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer Kitchen Appliances - https://bit.ly/KitchenAppliancesIUse Knives I use - https://amzn.to/41Z6eUg *********************** ⏩𝓢𝓾𝓫𝓼𝓬𝓻𝓲𝓫𝓮 𝓱𝓮𝓻𝓮: https://goo.gl/UE2pmL *********************** 𝗖𝗵𝗲𝗰𝗸 𝗼𝘂𝘁 𝘁𝗵𝗲𝘀𝗲 𝗿𝗲𝗰𝗶𝗽𝗲𝘀 𝘁𝗼𝗼: Chhena Poda - https://youtu.be/5g8hrU7sJPg Eggless Chocolate Truffle Cake - https://youtu.be/w-yg_Ik84j8 *********************** NO BAKE CHEESECAKE Preparation time 1 hour Cooking time 20 minutes Serving 2 Ingredients 1 cup Cream cheese, क्रीम चीज़ 1 cup Hung curd, टंगा हुआ दही 1 cup Whipping cream, विपिग क्रीम ½ cup Sugar, चीनी ¼ tsp Lemon zest, लेमन जेस्ट 6 gms Agar agar, soaked in 4 tbsp water, अगर अगर ⅓ cup Strawberry puree , स्ट्रॉबेरी प्यूरी For Base 1 ½ cup Biscuits, crumbs, बिस्कुट ¼ cup Butter, मक्खन Other Ingredients Ohp sheets, ओ एच पी शीट Melted chocolate, पिघली हुई चॉकलेट Dragon fruit, slice, ड्रैगन फ्रूट fresh Mint leaves, पुदीना पता Cocoa powder, कोको पाउडर Icing sugar, आइसिंग शुगर Pomegranate pearls, अनार के दाने Process In a large bowl, add cream cheese, hung curd, whipping cream and half the sugar. Using an electric blender set at medium-high speed, beat the cream cheese in a large bowl until smooth. Add a little lemon zest and mix it well. In a bowl, add agar agar and little water and soaked in it for 5 minutes. In a large pan, add little water, soaked agar agar and mix it well. Add sugar and mix it well. Then add strawberry puree then switch off the flame and mix everything well. Transfer this into a bowl, let it come to a room temperature. Once the strawberry puree mixture is at normal temperature pour it into a cream cheese mixture and mix it well. Pour the cream cheese mixture over the biscuit crust; smooth the top with a rubber spatula. and refrigerate until firm,1 to 1 ½ hours. Take the cake out from the refrigerator and place on a cooling rack. Once set, Place the ohp sheet in the center. Pour the melted chocolate in the center over the cheesecake. Cover it from all the sides evenly. Garnished it with dragon fruit, fresh mint leaves, cocoa powder, icing sugar and pomegranate pearls. Cut it into a slice and serve. For Base In a bowl, add biscuits and crush them with a rolling pin or hands. In a nonstick pan, add butter and let it melt completely. Add biscuits crumbs and mix well until all the crumbs are nicely coated. Press the crumb mixture into a cake tin, spreading evenly all the side; press flat. Chill crust in freezer for at least 10 minutes. *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar on your favorite Social Media channels: ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar #Cheesecake #NobakeCheesecake #Pullupcake #Cake #Nobakedessert #Howtomakecheesecake #Easycheesecakerecipe #cheesecakewithyogurt #trendingrecipes

raw_text: MASALA CHEESE TOAST - A perfect snack for any time, anyone. Very few snack items come close to a cheese-filled, crispy, I mean Kripsy toast. Do try this recipe and let me know how you like it. #CheeseToast #Garlicbread #Ranveerbrar *********************** 🍽️𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡 𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣 🍽️ RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer Kitchen Appliances - https://bit.ly/KitchenAppliancesIUse Knives I use - https://amzn.to/36VdxoF *********************** Let's help 𝘽𝙖𝙣𝙙𝙚𝙡 𝘾𝙝𝙚𝙚𝙨𝙚 get its GI Tag 𝗖𝗹𝗶𝗰𝗸 𝗵𝗲𝗿𝗲 𝘁𝗼 𝘀𝗶𝗴𝗻 𝗺𝘆 𝗽𝗲𝘁𝗶𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻 - https://change.org/GITagforBandelCheese *********************** ⏩𝓒𝓵𝓲𝓬𝓴 𝓽𝓸 𝓢𝓾𝓫𝓼𝓬𝓻𝓲𝓫𝓮 : https://goo.gl/UE2pmL *********************** MASALA CHEESE TOAST Preparation time 10 minutes Cooking time 15-20 minutes Serving 2 Ingredients For Filling 3 fresh Green chillies, chopped , हरी मिर्च 1 inch Ginger, chopped , अदरक 1 medium Tomato, deseeded & diced , टमाटर Few Coriander leaves, chopped , धनिया पत्ता ½ cup Pizza cheese, garted , पिज़्ज़ा चीज ½ tbsp Oil , तेल For Spread 2 heaped tbsp Mayonnaise , मेयोनेज़ 1 tbsp Green chutney , हरी चटनी For Batter Without Egg 1 cup Milk , दूध 2-3 tbsp Gram flour (besan) , बेसन 2 tbsp Mayonnaise , मेयोनेज़ Salt to taste , नमक स्वादानुसार ½ tsp Degi Red chilli powder , देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर ¼ tsp Turmeric powder , हल्दी पाउडर For Batter With Egg 2 Eggs , अंडे 1 tbsp Gram flour (besan) , बेसन ¼ cup Milk , दूध Salt to taste , नमक स्वादानुसार ½ tsp Degi Red chilli powder , देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर For Salad 1 medium Onion, sliced , प्याज ¼ cup Cabbage, sliced , पत्ता गोभी ½ medium Tomato, sliced , टमाटर Few Coriander leaves, chopped , धनिया पत्ता 1 fresh Green chilli, chopped , हरी मिर्च Salt to taste , नमक स्वादानुसार 1 tbsp Olive oil , जैतून का तेल Other Ingredients ½ cup Poha , पोहा Oil for frying , तेल तलने के लिए Process For Filling In a bowl, add chopped green chillies, ginger, tomato, coriander leaves. Add grated cheese and mix everything well. Add a little oil and mix it well. Keep aside for further use. For Spread In a bowl, add mayonnaise, green chutney and mix it well. Keep aside for further use. For Batter Without Egg In a bowl, add gram flour, milk, mayonnaise, salt to taste, degi red chilli powder, turmeric powder and whisk it well. Keep aside for further use. For Batter With Egg In a bowl, add egg, milk, gram flour, salt to taste, degi red chilli powder and whisk it well. Keep aside for further use. For Salad In a bowl, add onion, cabbage, tomatoes, coriander leaves, green chillies, salt to taste, olive oil and mix it well. For Assembling Non-Fried Cheesy Bread Pakora Take 4 bread slices and apply prepared mayonnaise mixture evenly on all the sides. Now, add the filling and then place the other bread slice on it to make a sandwich. Heat a pan on medium heat and add oil, meanwhile dip then sandwich in the egg mixture and coat it properly and then coat it with poha and place it into a hot pan and cook it from both sides until light brown and crisp. Now, dip the other bread sandwich into the without egg mixture and coat it properly with poha and then place it into a hot pan and cook it from both sides until light brown and crisp. Remove and repeat this process for other bread slices. Serve hot with prepared salad. *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar on your favorite Social Media channels: ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar #Simplevegsandwich #masalacheesetoastsandwich #Bombaymasalasandwich #cheesetoastsandwich #cheesetoastranveerbrar #breadpakora #breadpakorarecipe #chillicheesetoast #frenchtoastnoegg #frenchtoastranveerbrar #grilledcheese #cheesegarlicbread #bombaysandwich #DominosGarlicbread

raw_text: TOMATO CHUTNEY PAAKSHALA - Ek nahin, 2 nahin, 3 Tomato chutney recipes in today's Paakshala. So whether you like it North Indian Style or South Indian tomato chutney, or even Green Tomato chutney, all 3 recipes are here :)#TomatoChutney #Chutneyrecipe #Ranveerbrar *********************** 𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡 𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣 🔪Knives I use - https://amzn.to/41Z6eUg 🛒RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer 📟Kitchen Appliances - https://bit.ly/KitchenAppliancesIUse *********************** ⏩𝓢𝓾𝓫𝓼𝓬𝓻𝓲𝓫𝓮 𝓱𝓮𝓻𝓮: https://goo.gl/UE2pmL *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App 📲 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** TOMATO CHUTNEY 2 WAYS Ingredients For North Style Tomato Chutney 2 tbsp Oil (तेल) 2 Dry Red Chillies (सूखी लाल मिर्च) ½ tsp Fenugreek Seeds (मेथी दाना) 1 tsp Onion Seeds (कलौंजी) 5 medium Tomatoes – chopped (टमाटर) Salt to taste (नमक स्वादानुसार) ½ tsp Degi Red Chilli Powder (देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर) 1 tbsp Jaggery (गुड) 2 tbsp Vinegar (सिरका) 2 Bay Leaves (तेजपत्ता) 2-3 Cloves (लॉन्ग) For South Style Tomato Chutney 2 tbsp Oil (तेल) 1 tsp Whole Black Gram (गोटा उड़द) 1 tsp Chana Dal (चना दाल) 2 Dry Red chillies (सूखी लाल मिर्च) 1 inch Ginger – chopped (अदरक) 1 medium Onion – chopped (प्याज़) Salt to taste (नमक स्वादानुसार) 3 medium Tomatoes – roughly chopped (टमाटर) ½ tsp Degi Red Chilli Powder (देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर) For Tempering 1 tbsp Oil (तेल) ½ tsp Whole Black Gram (गोटा उड़द) 1 tsp Mustard Seeds (सरसों के बीज) 1 sprig Curry Leaves (कड़ी पत्ता Process For North Style Tomato Chutney In a kadai heat oil and add dry red chillies, fenugreek seeds, onion seeds let them crackle. Now add tomatoes, salt, degi red chilli powder saute for a minute, cover and cook until 15-20 minutes. Meanwhile in a small pan add vinegar, bay leaves, cloves and boil it on high flames until it’s half. Remove the lid and add the boiled vinegar, jaggery, mix everything together and saute for a minute and enjoy with rice or roti. For South Style Tomato Chutney In a kadai heat oil whole black gram, chana dal saute until light golden brown. Now add dry red chillies, ginger, onion, salt saute until translucent. Then add tomatoes, degi red chilli powder, mix everything properly, cover and cook for 15-20 minutes or until soft. Once soft remove and let it cool a little then put it in a grinder jar and grind into a fine paste. Remove in a serving bowl and add the tempering on it and serve it. For Tempering In a tempering pan heat oil, whole black gram, mustard seeds, curry leaves saute for a minute and it’s ready. HARE TAMATAR KI CHUTNEY Preparation time : 15 minutes Cooking time : 25-30 minutes Servings : 6-8 Ingredients For Roasting Tomato 6-8 raw Green Tomatoes - cut in 4 pieces (कच्चे हरे टमाटर) 1 tbsp Mustard Oil (सरसों का तेल) For First Tempering 2 tbsp Mustard Oil (सरसों का तेल) 1 tsp Cumin Seeds (जीरा) ¼ tsp Asafoetida (हिंग) 1 dry Red Chilli (सूखी लाल मिर्च) Roasted Tomatoes (भुने हुए टमाटर) 3-4 tbsp Jaggery (गुड) Water (पानी) 1 heaped tbsp Tamarind Pulp (इमली का गूदा) ½ tsp Black Pepper Powder (काली मिर्च का पाउडर) 1 inch Ginger - chopped (अदरक) Salt to taste (नमक स्वादानुसार) 2-3 tbsp roasted Peanuts (भुनी हुई मूंगफली) For Second Tempering 2 tbsp Mustard Oil (सरसों का तेल) ½ tsp Fennel Seeds (सौंफ) ¼ tsp Fenugreek Seeds (मेथी दाना) ½ tsp Sesame Seeds (तिल) For Garnish 1 raw Green Tomato (कच्चे हरे टमाटर) 1 tbsp Sugar (चीनी) Water (पानी) Process For Roasting Tomato Heat a pan on high heat until super hot then add the raw green tomatoes, mustard oil and roast them until charred. Remove and keep aside for further use. For Hara Tamatar Ki Chutney In a kadai heat mustard oil and add cumin seeds, asafoetida dry red chilli, roasted tomatoes, jaggery, water, tamarind pulp, black pepper powder, ginger, salt and mix everything together then cover and cook it for 12-15 minutes on low heat. Remove the lid and blend it using a hand blender, now cover and let it cook until the oil starts separating and also keep on stirring in between. Switch off the flames. Now in another pan heat mustard oil, then add cumin seeds, sesame seeds, fenugreek seeds and let them crackle then add it to the chutney and also roasted peanuts then mix everything properly and keep aside to cool down. Store in an airtight container in the fridge. Optional :- For Garnish In a small pan and tomato wedges, sugar, water then cover and cook until soft. Remove and place them as a garnish on the chutney. ******************************** 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar on your favorite Social Media channels: ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar #tomatochutney #thakkalichutney #ranveerbrar

ingredients: 1 kg Mutton (with bone) , मटन | 2-3 medium Onion, sliced , प्याज | 2 inch Ginger, chopped , अदरक | 6-8 Garlic cloves , लहसुन | 3-4 fresh Green chillies , हरी मिर्च | ½ tsp Salt , नमक | 1 cup Curd , दही | 2 tbsp Coriander powder , धनिया पाउडर | 1 tsp Turmeric powder , हल्दी पाउडर | 1 tsp Degi Red chilli powder , देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर | ¼ tsp Cumin powder , जीरा पाउडर | ¼ cup Ghee , घी | 2 Black cardamom , बड़ी इलायची | 3-4 Green cardamom , हरी इलायची | 8-10 Cloves , लॉन्ग | 12-15 Black pepper corns , काली मिर्च के दाने | 1 Bay leaf, तेजपत्ता | 2 inches Cinnamon stick , दालचीनी | 3 medium Onion, sliced , प्याज | Water or Stock as required , पानी जरूरत अनुसार | 1 cup Coriander leaves , धनिया पत्ता | ½ tsp Sugar , चीनी | 1 tbsp Oil , तेल | 1-2 fresh Green chillies , हरी मिर्च | 50 ml Rum (optional)

raw_text: FAUJI MUTTON CURRY - Check out my recipe for this super popular style of Biryani.. *********************** 🍽️𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡 𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣 🍽️ RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer Kitchen Appliances - https://bit.ly/KitchenAppliancesIUse Knives I use - https://amzn.to/36VdxoF *********************** Let's help 𝘽𝙖𝙣𝙙𝙚𝙡 𝘾𝙝𝙚𝙚𝙨𝙚 get its GI Tag 𝗖𝗹𝗶𝗰𝗸 𝗵𝗲𝗿𝗲 𝘁𝗼 𝘀𝗶𝗴𝗻 𝗺𝘆 𝗽𝗲𝘁𝗶𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻 - https://change.org/GITagforBandelCheese *********************** ⏩𝓒𝓵𝓲𝓬𝓴 𝓽𝓸 𝓢𝓾𝓫𝓼𝓬𝓻𝓲𝓫𝓮 : https://goo.gl/UE2pmL *********************** 𝗖𝗵𝗲𝗰𝗸 𝗼𝘂𝘁 𝘁𝗵𝗲𝘀𝗲 𝗿𝗲𝗰𝗶𝗽𝗲𝘀 𝘁𝗼𝗼: Lucknow Style Mutton Korma - https://youtu.be/AIkEt9c8mRo Bhuna Gosht - https://youtu.be/NFMFXvEdCMQ Nihari - https://youtu.be/axon9qBTmXc *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App 📲 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** FAUJI MUTTON CURRY Preparation time 15 minutes Cooking time 35-40 minutes Serving 4 Ingredients For Marination 1 kg Mutton (with bone) , मटन 2-3 medium Onion, sliced , प्याज Few Mint leaves , पुदीने के पत्ते 2 inch Ginger, chopped , अदरक 6-8 Garlic cloves , लहसुन 3-4 fresh Green chillies , हरी मिर्च ½ tsp Salt , नमक 1 cup Curd , दही 2 tbsp Coriander powder , धनिया पाउडर 1 tsp Turmeric powder , हल्दी पाउडर 1 tsp Degi Red chilli powder , देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर ¼ tsp Cumin powder , जीरा पाउडर For Tempering ¼ cup Ghee , घी 2 Black cardamom , बड़ी इलायची 3-4 Green cardamom , हरी इलायची 8-10 Cloves , लॉन्ग 12-15 Black pepper corns , काली मिर्च के दाने 1 Bay leaf, तेजपत्ता 2 inches Cinnamon stick , दालचीनी 3 medium Onion, sliced , प्याज Marinated Mutton , मैरीनेट किया हुआ मटन Water or Stock as required , पानी जरूरत अनुसार For Green Paste 1 cup Coriander leaves , धनिया पत्ता ½ tsp Sugar , चीनी 1 tbsp Oil , तेल 1-2 fresh Green chillies , हरी मिर्च 50 ml Rum (optional) For Garnish Fresh Coriander leaves , धनिया पत्ता Process For Marination Firstly in a mortal pastel, roughly crush ginger, garlic, green chillies, salt and set aside. In a bowl add mutton, sliced onion, mint leaves, crushed ginger-garlic-green chillies, curd, coriander powder, turmeric powder, degi red chilli powder, cumin powder and mix everything properly and set aside overnight or at least 1-2 hours. For Tempering In a heavy bottom kadai heat ghee then add black cardamom, green cardamom, cloves, black pepper cons, bay leaf, cinnamon stick and let it crackle. Now add sliced onions and saute until browned properly. Then add the marinated mutton and continue sauteing for 5-8 minutes or until the mutton has light brown coloured. Add water or stock then cover and cook for 20-25 minutes or until the mutton is 80% cooked. Remove the lid and stir it properly then add the prepared green paste and continue cooking until the mutton is cooked completely. Serve hot and garnish with fresh coriander leaves. For Green Paste In a grinder jar add coriander leaves, sugar, oil, green chillies and grind it into a coarse paste and set aside. *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar on your favorite Social Media channels: ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar #muttoncurry #dumbiryani #ranveerbrar #militarycanteenbiryani #militarymutton #faujimuttoncurry #muttondumbiryanirecipe #hyderabadimuttoncurry #muttoncurryranveerbrar #muttonkulamburecipe

raw_text: SESAME BREAD TOAST - Anytime snack, that's what sandwiches are, right? Get creative with the filling and you'll never be bored. Here's my recipe for a crispy Vegetable-Sesame masala filled Toast. Super kripsy, you got to try this... #MasalaToast #VegSandwich #RanveerBrar *********************** 🍽️𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡 𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣 🍽️ RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer Kitchen Appliances - https://bit.ly/KitchenAppliancesIUse Knives I use - https://amzn.to/36VdxoF *********************** 𝗖𝗹𝗶𝗰𝗸 𝗵𝗲𝗿𝗲 𝘁𝗼 𝘀𝗶𝗴𝗻 𝗺𝘆 𝗽𝗲𝘁𝗶𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻 - https://change.org/GITagforBandelCheese *********************** ⏩𝓢𝓾𝓫𝓼𝓬𝓻𝓲𝓫𝓮 𝓱𝓮𝓻𝓮: https://goo.gl/UE2pmL *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App 📲 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** 𝗦𝗘𝗦𝗔𝗠𝗘 𝗕𝗥𝗘𝗔𝗗 𝗧𝗢𝗔𝗦𝗧 Preparation time : 15 minutes Cooking time : 15-20 minutes Servings : 2 Ingredients For Vegetable Sesame Mixture ¼ cup Sweet Corn Kernels - crushed (भुट्टे के दाने) 1 small Carrot - chopped (गाजर) 8-10 French Beans - chopped (फ्रेंच बींस) 1 fresh Green Chilli - chopped (हरी मिर्च) 1 inch Ginger - chopped (अदरक) 2-3 heaped tbsp Sesame Seeds - lightly toasted (तिल) Salt to taste (नमक स्वादानुसार) 2 tbsp Coriander Leaves - chopped (धनिया पत्ता) 2 medium Potatoes - boiled & grated (आलू) Other Ingredients 4 slices Bread (ब्रेड) Sesame Seeds for coating (तिल) Oil for frying (तेल तलने के लिए) For Sesame Garlic Ketchup 1 tbsp Oil (तेल) 1 heaped tbsp Garlic - chopped (लहसुन) 2 heaped tbsp Sesame Seeds (तिल) ½ tsp Degi Red Chilli Powder (देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर) Water (पानी) 1 cup Tomato Ketchup (टाॅमेटो केचप) Process 𝗙𝗼𝗿 𝗩𝗲𝗴𝗲𝘁𝗮𝗯𝗹𝗲 𝗦𝗲𝘀𝗮𝗺𝗲 𝗠𝗶𝘅𝘁𝘂𝗿𝗲 In a bowl add crushed sweet corn kernels, chopped carrot, french beans, green chillies, ginger, toasted sesame seeds, salt, coriander leaves, grated potatoes and mix everything properly until well combined. 𝗙𝗼𝗿 𝗔𝘀𝘀𝗲𝗺𝗯𝗹𝗶𝗻𝗴 𝗦𝗲𝘀𝗮𝗺𝗲 𝗕𝗿𝗲𝗮𝗱 𝗧𝗼𝗮𝘀𝘁 Take sliced bread and sprinkle some water on them then spread a big spoonful of the vegetable sesame mixture on the bread properly and evenly. Now apply sesame seeds on the mixture and shallow fry in medium hot oil until golden brown and crispy from both sides. Remove and cut the edges of the bread and serve in it by cutting in your desired shape with Sesame Garlic Ketchup. 𝗙𝗼𝗿 𝗦𝗲𝘀𝗮𝗺𝗲 𝗚𝗮𝗿𝗹𝗶𝗰 𝗞𝗲𝘁𝗰𝗵𝘂𝗽 In a pan heat oil and add chopped garlic saute until fragrant. Now add sesame seeds saute for a few seconds then switch off the flames and add degi red chilli powder mix it once. Then add water, tomato ketchup and mix everything properly. Keep aside for further use. *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar on your favorite Social Media channels: ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar #SimpleVegSandwich #Kidstiffinandbreakfast #Easysnacks #Kidssnacks #Bacchonkeliyesandwich #Masalatoast #Bombaymasalasandwich #sandwichfilling

title: बिना Steamer के झोल मोमो | Spicy Veg Jhol Momo Curry | वेज मोमो की ग्रेवी |Cheese Momo| Chef रणवीर
description: MOMO CURRY - If you are craving for a hot & spicy restaurant style Momo curry, or Veg Momos in gravy then this recipe is for you. Trust me, it's too tempting to resist!! #VegMomos #Momosrecipe #RanveerBrar *********************** 🍽️𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡 𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣 🍽️
ingredients: 1 cup Refined flour, मैदा | Salt to taste, नमक स्वाद अनुसार | 1 tsp Oil, तेल | Water as required, पानी | 1 Spring onion, chopped, प्याज पत्ता | 1 cup Cabbage, finely chopped, पत्तागोभी | 2 Green chilli, finely chopped, हरी मिर्च | 2 tbsp Corn kernels, roughly chopped, मकई के दाने | Salt to taste, नमक स्वाद अनुसार | ½ cup Processed cheese, grated, चीज़ | 2 tbsp Coriander leaves, chopped, धनिया के पत्ते | 1 tbsp Oil, तेल | 1 tsp Cumin seeds, जीरा | 2 medium size Onion, chopped, प्याज | 2 medium size Tomato, finely chopped, टमाटर | 2 Green chillies, chopped, हरी मिर्च | ½ tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर | ½ tsp Degi red chilli powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर | ¼ tsp Cumin powder, जीरा पाउडर | 2 tsp Coriander powder, धनिया पाउडर | 2-3 Triphala, त्रिफला | 2 ½ cups Water, पानी | Salt to taste, नमक स्वाद अनुसार | ¼ tsp Sugar, चीनी | 1 tbsp Coriander leaves, chopped, धनिया के पत्ते
instructions: In a bowl, add refined flour, salt to taste, oil and water to knead a semi soft dough. | Cover it with a dam cloth and keep it aside for 8-10 minutes. | In a large bowl, add spring onion, cabbage, green chilli, corn kernels, salt to taste and set aside for it to lose water for 5-10 minutes. | Remove and squeeze out all the water and keep aside for later use. | Add processed cheese, coriander leaves and mix everything well. | Now take a small portion of the dough and roll it in a thin small round then apply water on all sides, keep a small spoonful of filling and fold it giving it your desired shape. | Make the rest of them in the same manner. | In a kadai, heat oil, add cumin seeds and let it splutter well. | Add onion and saute on medium flame until translucent. | Add green chilli and saute it well. | Add turmeric powder, degi red chilli powder, tomatoes and saute for 4-5 minutes. | Add cumin powder, coriander powder saute until the raw aroma goes out. | Add Szechuan peppercorn, water, salt to taste, sugar and mix everything well. | Now, add the prepared momo into the curry. | Cover it with a lid and cook on low flame for 2 minutes. | Switch off the flame, add coriander leaves and mix it well. | Garnish it with coriander sprig and serve hot. | *********************** | For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: | 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid | 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS | *********************** | 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar on your favorite Social Media channels: | ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ | ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ | ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar

https://youtu.be/5B09gJSIZss Veg Spring Roll - https://youtu.be/2Kp--pUv7l8 Kurkure Momo - https://youtu.be/zY0Aq3qlCKA *********************** ⏩𝓢𝓾𝓫𝓼𝓬𝓻𝓲𝓫𝓮 𝓱𝓮𝓻𝓮: https://goo.gl/UE2pmL *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App 📲 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** VEG MOMO CURRY Preparation time 10 minutes Cooking time 15-20 minutes Serving 2 Ingredients For Dough 1 cup Refined flour, मैदा Salt to taste, नमक स्वाद अनुसार 1 tsp Oil, तेल Water as required, पानी For Filling 1 Spring onion, chopped, प्याज पत्ता 1 cup Cabbage, finely chopped, पत्तागोभी 2 Green chilli, finely chopped, हरी मिर्च 2 tbsp Corn kernels, roughly chopped, मकई के दाने Salt to taste, नमक स्वाद अनुसार ½ cup Processed cheese, grated, चीज़ 2 tbsp Coriander leaves, chopped, धनिया के पत्ते For Curry 1 tbsp Oil, तेल 1 tsp Cumin seeds, जीरा 2 medium size Onion, chopped, प्याज 2 medium size Tomato, finely chopped, टमाटर 2 Green chillies, chopped, हरी मिर्च ½ tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर ½ tsp Degi red chilli powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर ¼ tsp Cumin powder, जीरा पाउडर 2 tsp Coriander powder, धनिया पाउडर 2-3 Triphala, त्रिफला 2 ½ cups Water, पानी Salt to taste, नमक स्वाद अनुसार ¼ tsp Sugar, चीनी 1 tbsp Coriander leaves, chopped, धनिया के पत्ते For Garnish Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता Process For Dough In a bowl, add refined flour, salt to taste, oil and water to knead a semi soft dough. Cover it with a dam cloth and keep it aside for 8-10 minutes. For Filling In a large bowl, add spring onion, cabbage, green chilli, corn kernels, salt to taste and set aside for it to lose water for 5-10 minutes. Remove and squeeze out all the water and keep aside for later use. Add processed cheese, coriander leaves and mix everything well. For Curry Now take a small portion of the dough and roll it in a thin small round then apply water on all sides, keep a small spoonful of filling and fold it giving it your desired shape. Make the rest of them in the same manner. In a kadai, heat oil, add cumin seeds and let it splutter well. Add onion and saute on medium flame until translucent. Add green chilli and saute it well. Add turmeric powder, degi red chilli powder, tomatoes and saute for 4-5 minutes. Add cumin powder, coriander powder saute until the raw aroma goes out. Add Szechuan peppercorn, water, salt to taste, sugar and mix everything well. Now, add the prepared momo into the curry. Cover it with a lid and cook on low flame for 2 minutes. Switch off the flame, add coriander leaves and mix it well. Garnish it with coriander sprig and serve hot. *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar on your favorite Social Media channels: ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar #momos #binamoldkemomo #momofoldingtechniques #chineserecipe #vegetablesinhotgarlicsauce #momodip #momoskaisebanatehain

title: Basics of Chocolate | चॉकलेट मूस कैसे बनाते हैं | Chocolate Mousse eggless recipe | Chef RanveerBrar
description: CHOCOLATE MOUSSE & BASICS OF CHOCOLATE - Right since my days in hotel school and later on hotels, Chocolate has been one of my favourite ingredients to work with. Pretty much at par with eggs. Here's my recipe for 2 versions of Chocolate Mousse, both eggless and one Vegan. Do try and let me know how you like it. *********************** 𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡 𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣 🔪Knives I use - https://amzn.to/4ar57BI
ingredients: 400 gms Couverture dark chocolate, cut into cubes, कुवेचर डार्क चॉकलेट | 150 gms Hot water, गर्म पानी | 200 ml Coconut milk, नारियल का दूध | 400 gms Compound Dark chocolate, cut into cubes, कंपाउंड डार्क चॉकलेट | 1 cup Melted chocolate, पिघली हुई चॉकलेट | 2 cups Whipping cream (unwhipped), विपिग क्रीम
instructions: 𝗖𝗵𝗼𝗰𝗼𝗹𝗮𝘁𝗲 𝗠𝗼𝘂𝘀𝘀𝗲 𝗪𝗶𝘁𝗵 𝗪𝗮𝘁𝗲𝗿 | In a bowl, add chopped chocolate. | Keep it aside. | In a sauce pot, add water, coconut milk once it's boiled. | Transfer it into the chocolate bowl and mix it well. | Place the bowl on top of another slightly smaller bowl, filled with ice and cold water. | Whisk vigorously until the mousse begins to thicken. | With the help of a blender to smooth texture. | To serve the mousse, you can make a quenelle out of it and serve it or pour it into a serving glass and set it to chilli for 10 minutes. | Garnish with orange slices and served chilled. | 𝗖𝗵𝗼𝗰𝗼𝗹𝗮𝘁𝗲 𝗠𝗼𝘂𝘀𝘀𝗲 𝗪𝗶𝘁𝗵 𝗪𝗵𝗶𝗽𝗽𝗶𝗻𝗴 𝗖𝗿𝗲𝗮𝗺 | Preheat water in the double boiler over medium heat | Add the compound chocolate in a bowl and place on the boiling water to melt the chocolate. | Meanwhile whisk the whipping cream until soft picks. | Mix the whipped cream into the melted chocolate and whisk it well until smooth texture. | Insert a star nozzle into a piping bag and keep it ready. | With the help of a spatula fill the piping bag with the prepared chocolate mousse. | To serve the mousse, take a serving glass and apply some chocolate syrup on its inner surface and fill it with the chocolate mousse, some orange segments and mint leaves. | Keep in the refrigerator for 10-15 minutes. | Remove and garnish with orange segments, mint leaves and serve chill | *********************** | For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: | 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid | 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS | *********************** | 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar on your favorite Social Media channels: | ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ | ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ | ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar
raw_text: CHOCOLATE MOUSSE & BASICS OF CHOCOLATE - Right since my days in hotel school and later on hotels, Chocolate has been one of my favourite ingredients to work with. Pretty much at par with eggs. Here's my recipe for 2 versions of Chocolate Mousse, both eggless and one Vegan. Do try and let me know how you like it. *********************** 𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡 𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣 🔪Knives I use - https://amzn.to/4ar57BI 🛒RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer 📟Kitchen Appliances - https://bit.ly/KitchenAppliancesIUse *********************** ⏩𝓒𝓵𝓲𝓬𝓴 𝓽𝓸 𝓢𝓾𝓫𝓼𝓬𝓻𝓲𝓫𝓮 : https://goo.gl/UE2pmL *********************** 𝗖𝗵𝗲𝗰𝗸 𝗼𝘂𝘁 𝘁𝗵𝗲𝘀𝗲 𝗿𝗲𝗰𝗶𝗽𝗲𝘀 𝘁𝗼𝗼: https://bit.ly/ChocolateRecipesbyRB *********************** 𝗘𝗚𝗚𝗟𝗘𝗦𝗦 𝗖𝗛𝗢𝗖𝗢𝗟𝗔𝗧𝗘 𝗠𝗢𝗨𝗦𝗦𝗘 (2 ways) Preparation time: 15-20 minutes + Cooling 10-15 minutes Serving: 2 Ingredients Chocolate Mousse With Water 400 gms Couverture dark chocolate, cut into cubes, कुवेचर डार्क चॉकलेट 150 gms Hot water, गर्म पानी 200 ml Coconut milk, नारियल का दूध Chocolate Mousse With Whipping Cream 400 gms Compound Dark chocolate, cut into cubes, कंपाउंड डार्क चॉकलेट 1 cup Melted chocolate, पिघली हुई चॉकलेट 2 cups Whipping cream (unwhipped), विपिग क्रीम For Garnish Chocolate syrup, चॉकलेट सिरप Orange segments, संतरा Mint leaves, पुदीना पता Process 𝗖𝗵𝗼𝗰𝗼𝗹𝗮𝘁𝗲 𝗠𝗼𝘂𝘀𝘀𝗲 𝗪𝗶𝘁𝗵 𝗪𝗮𝘁𝗲𝗿 In a bowl, add chopped chocolate. Keep it aside. In a sauce pot, add water, coconut milk once it's boiled. Transfer it into the chocolate bowl and mix it well. Place the bowl on top of another slightly smaller bowl, filled with ice and cold water. Whisk vigorously until the mousse begins to thicken. With the help of a blender to smooth texture. To serve the mousse, you can make a quenelle out of it and serve it or pour it into a serving glass and set it to chilli for 10 minutes. Garnish with orange slices and served chilled. 𝗖𝗵𝗼𝗰𝗼𝗹𝗮𝘁𝗲 𝗠𝗼𝘂𝘀𝘀𝗲 𝗪𝗶𝘁𝗵 𝗪𝗵𝗶𝗽𝗽𝗶𝗻𝗴 𝗖𝗿𝗲𝗮𝗺 Preheat water in the double boiler over medium heat Add the compound chocolate in a bowl and place on the boiling water to melt the chocolate. Meanwhile whisk the whipping cream until soft picks. Mix the whipped cream into the melted chocolate and whisk it well until smooth texture. Insert a star nozzle into a piping bag and keep it ready. With the help of a spatula fill the piping bag with the prepared chocolate mousse. To serve the mousse, take a serving glass and apply some chocolate syrup on its inner surface and fill it with the chocolate mousse, some orange segments and mint leaves. Keep in the refrigerator for 10-15 minutes. Remove and garnish with orange segments, mint leaves and serve chill *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar on your favorite Social Media channels: ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar #ChocolateMousse #Chocolaterecipes #Ranveerbrar

title: Keema Samosa | कीमे के समोसे l Easy Folding Technique | मीट समोसा कैसे बनाएँ | Chef Ranveer Brar
description: MUTTON KEEMA SAMOSA - (Detailed recipe below) Yes, this has been a long pending recipe, but better late than never :) So here's my recipe for Mutton Keema Samosa. Do try it and oh, don't miss the interesting stories behind it :) #MuttonKeemaSamosa #Muttonrecipe #Ranveerbrar *********************** 🍽️𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡 𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣 🍽️
ingredients: 1 ½ inch Ginger, अदरक | 5 large Garlic cloves, लहसुन | 3 fresh Green chillies, हरी मिर्च | Sal to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार | ½ kg Mutton mince (keema) , मटन का कीमा | 2 tbsp Curd, beaten, दही | 1 Black cardamom, काली इलाइची | ½ tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर | 1 ¼ heaped tsp Coriander powder, धनिया पाउडर | ¼ tsp Cumin powder, जीरा पाउडर | 1 tsp Degi red chilli powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर | 2 tsp Ghee, घी | 1 medium Onion, chopped, प्याज | 1 ½ cup Refined flour, मैदा | 2 tsp Ghee, घी | Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार | 1 whole Egg, अंडा | ½ tsp Ghee at the end, घी | 2 Cloves, लौंग | 1 tsp Ghee, घी
instructions: For Crushed Paste | In a mortar pestle, add ginger, garlic, green chili and salt to taste and make a smooth paste of it. | For Keema Stuffing | In a medium sized bowl, add mutton mince, curd, black cardamom, turmeric powder, coriander powder, cumin powder, degi red chilli powder and ghee mix everything well. | In a heavy bottom pan, transfer the keema mixture and saute on medium flame. | Keep sauteing for 3-4 minutes, breaking the lumps if any. | Onces the keem is cooked properly. | Make a well in the centre of the mixture and keep a small steel katori with a few hot charcoal pieces or coconut husk in it. | Keep a few cloves over the coals and drizzle ghee over and cover immediately tolet the smoky flavour infuse for 1-2 minutes. | Remove the cover, remove the katori and mix the mutton mixture well. | Remove the black cardamom from the mixture. | Transfer the prepared stuffing into a bowl and add chopped onion, mint leaves, coriander leaves and mix it well. let it cool down to room temperature. | In a bowl, add refined flour, ghee, salt to taste, and whole egg knead a firm dough. | Cover it with a dam cloth and rest for 10-15 minutes. | Pinch a large ball from the dough and roll out as thin as possible on a dusted floor. | Cut into half and fold one end to make a cone, stuff it with some prepared mixture, and fold the other end over to close the open end. | Apply a little water on the open edge and press to seal. | Similarly make more samosas with the rest of the dough and filling. | Heat oil in a kadai. | Slide the samosas into the hot oil and deep-fry till golden brown and crisp. | Drain on absorbent paper. | Arrange them on a serving plate and serve hot with mint chutney, onion rings, lemon wedges and mint sprigs. | *********************** | 𝗖𝗵𝗲𝗰𝗸 𝗼𝘂𝘁 𝘁𝗵𝗲𝘀𝗲 𝗿𝗲𝗰𝗶𝗽𝗲𝘀 𝘁𝗼𝗼: | Galouti/ Galawati Kebab - raw_text: MUTTON KEEMA SAMOSA - (Detailed recipe below) Yes, this has been a long pending recipe, but better late than never :) So here's my recipe for Mutton Keema Samosa. Do try it and oh, don't miss the interesting stories behind it :) #MuttonKeemaSamosa #Muttonrecipe #Ranveerbrar *********************** 🍽️𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡 𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣 🍽️ RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer Kitchen Appliances - https://bit.ly/KitchenAppliancesIUse Knives I use - https://amzn.to/36VdxoF *********************** MUTTON KEEMA SAMOSA Preparation time 10-15 minutes Cooking time 20-25 minutes Serving 2-4 Ingredients For Crushed Paste 1 ½ inch Ginger, अदरक 5 large Garlic cloves, लहसुन 3 fresh Green chillies, हरी मिर्च Sal to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार For Keema Stuffing ½ kg Mutton mince (keema) , मटन का कीमा 2 tbsp Curd, beaten, दही 1 Black cardamom, काली इलाइची ½ tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर 1 ¼ heaped tsp Coriander powder, धनिया पाउडर ¼ tsp Cumin powder, जीरा पाउडर 1 tsp Degi red chilli powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर 2 tsp Ghee, घी 1 medium Onion, chopped, प्याज Few Mint leaves, chopped, पुदीने के पत्ते Few Coriander leaves, chopped, धनिया पत्ता For Dough 1 ½ cup Refined flour, मैदा 2 tsp Ghee, घी Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार 1 whole Egg, अंडा ½ tsp Ghee at the end, घी Oil for frying, तेल तलने के लिए For Smoke Coconut husk or coal, कोयला 2 Cloves, लौंग 1 tsp Ghee, घी For Garnish Onion rings , प्याज Fresh Mint sprig, पुदीने के पत्ते Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता Lemon wedge , नींबू Process For Crushed Paste In a mortar pestle, add ginger, garlic, green chili and salt to taste and make a smooth paste of it. For Keema Stuffing In a medium sized bowl, add mutton mince, curd, black cardamom, turmeric powder, coriander powder, cumin powder, degi red chilli powder and ghee mix everything well. In a heavy bottom pan, transfer the keema mixture and saute on medium flame. Keep sauteing for 3-4 minutes, breaking the lumps if any. Onces the keem is cooked properly. Make a well in the centre of the mixture and keep a small steel katori with a few hot charcoal pieces or coconut husk in it. Keep a few cloves over the coals and drizzle ghee over and cover immediately tolet the smoky flavour infuse for 1-2 minutes. Remove the cover, remove the katori and mix the mutton mixture well. Remove the black cardamom from the mixture. Transfer the prepared stuffing into a bowl and add chopped onion, mint leaves, coriander leaves and mix it well. let it cool down to room temperature. For Dough In a bowl, add refined flour, ghee, salt to taste, and whole egg knead a firm dough. Cover it with a dam cloth and rest for 10-15 minutes. Pinch a large ball from the dough and roll out as thin as possible on a dusted floor. Cut into half and fold one end to make a cone, stuff it with some prepared mixture, and fold the other end over to close the open end. Apply a little water on the open edge and press to seal. Similarly make more samosas with the rest of the dough and filling. For Frying Heat oil in a kadai. Slide the samosas into the hot oil and deep-fry till golden brown and crisp. Drain on absorbent paper. Arrange them on a serving plate and serve hot with mint chutney, onion rings, lemon wedges and mint sprigs. *********************** 𝗖𝗵𝗲𝗰𝗸 𝗼𝘂𝘁 𝘁𝗵𝗲𝘀𝗲 𝗿𝗲𝗰𝗶𝗽𝗲𝘀 𝘁𝗼𝗼: Galouti/ Galawati Kebab - https://youtu.be/yMEhhmqYYZM Hara Bhara Kebab - https://youtu.be/Kibc32FOF9Q Chapli Kabab - https://youtu.be/1Mvlmx2KDDk *********************** ⏩𝓢𝓾𝓫𝓼𝓬𝓻𝓲𝓫𝓮 𝓱𝓮𝓻𝓮: https://goo.gl/UE2pmL *********************** 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar on your favorite Social Media channels: ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar #keemasamosarecipe #muttonsamosa #ranveerbrar #ramadanspecial #iftarrecipes #muttonkeemasamosa

ingredients: 3 heaped tbsp Butter (मक्खन) | 1 medium Onion – chopped (प्याज़) | 1 tsp Ginger-Garlic paste (अदरक लहसुन का पेस्ट) | 1 heaped tsp Red Chillies & Garlic chutney (लाल मिर्च और लहसुन की चटनी) | 1 medium Tomato – chopped (टमाटर) | 1 medium Capsicum – chopped (शिमला मिर्च) | 1 fresh Green Chilli – chopped (हरी मिर्च) | ½ tsp Degi Red Chilli Powder (देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर) | 1 tsp Pav Bhaji Masala (पाव भाजी मसाला) | Salt to taste (नमक स्वादानुसार) | 5-6 Idlis – cut in 4 pieces (इडली) | 1 tbsp Butter (मक्खन) | 2 tbsp Coriander Leaves – chopped (धनिया पत्ता) | A pinch Pav Bhaji Masala (पाव भाजी मसाला)
instructions: In a kadai heat butter and add onion, saute until translucent. | Then add ginger-garlic paste, red chilli & garlic chutney and saute for half a minute. | Now add the tomatoes and cook until soft and then add capsicum, green chillies, degi red chilli powder, pav bhaji masala let it saute for a minute then add water, salt and mix everything properly. | Add the idlis in and toss it with light hands then cover and cook for 5-6 minutes, remove the lid and mix everything properly once. | Now finish it with more butter, lemon juice, coriander leaves and switch off the flames. | Serve hot in the serving plate and garnish with coriander leaves and pav bhaji masala. | *********************** | For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: | 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid | 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS | *********************** | 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar on your favorite Social Media channels: | ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ | ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ | ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar

title: Chhena Poda recipe without oven | छेना पोडा बनाने का आसान तरीका | Chef Ranveer Brar
description: CHHENA PODA - One of the classic desserts that's truly a treasure in its own right. Chhena Poda is one of those 'miracle' recipes that were accidentally invented. For all of you, here's my special treat. The much-awaited Chhena Poda recipe, how I learnt it... #ChhenaPodarecipe #Cheesecake #Ranveerbrar *********************** 🍽️𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡 𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣 🍽️
ingredients: 2 ltr Milk , दूध | 1 - 2 Lemon juice, नींबू का रस / 2 tbsp vinegar in 1/2 cup water | ½ cup Sugar, चीनी | 1 tsp Green cardamom powder, हरी इलायची पाउडर | 8-10 Cashewnut, chopped, काजू | 5-6 Almonds, chopped, बादाम | 6-8 Pistachios, blanched, chopped, पिस्ता | 2 tsp Semolina, रवा | A pinch of baking soda, बेकिंग सोडा | 1 tbsp Remaining chenna water, छेना का पानी | A pinch of salt, नमक | 1 cup Salt, नमक
instructions: In a large sauce pot, add milk and bring it to boil. | Add lime juice. | Keep on stirring and you will see the milk getting curdled. | Onces the milk gets curdled, pour the curdled milk into a bowl lined with a thin cotton napkin or muslin cloth. | Gently squeeze out the remaining whey from it. | Keep the remaining whey for further use. | In a parat or bowl, add the prepared chenna crumble and mash slightly, making sure the texture is uniform. | Add sugar, green cardamom powder and mix well until the sugar melts completely. | Add all dry fruits, semolina and mix it well. | In a small bowl mix oil and baking soda together, transfer it into a parat and mix it well. | Add little remaining whey water and prepare a smooth cake batter consistency. | Preheat the oven at 200° C. | Grease a cake mould with oil. | Place the sal leaves into the cake mould. | Pour the chenna poda mixture into the mould and tap twice. | Cover the mould with a lid. | Bake in the preheated oven for 1 hour or 50 minutes in the pressure cooker. | Bake chena poda till the top crust gets a dark golden color. | Remove from the oven once done. | Then check with a bamboo skewer or toothpick and it should be clean. | There should be no sticky batter on the toothpick. | Let the chenna poda cool completely in the pan. | Then remove it. | Cut into pieces. | Transfer into a serving plate and serve. | *********************** | For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: | 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid | 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS | *********************** | 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar on your favorite Social Media channels: | ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ | ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ | ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar
raw_text: CHHENA PODA - One of the classic desserts that's truly a treasure in its own right. Chhena Poda is one of those 'miracle' recipes that were accidentally invented. For all of you, here's my special treat. The much-awaited Chhena Poda recipe, how I learnt it... #ChhenaPodarecipe #Cheesecake #Ranveerbrar *********************** 🍽️𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡 𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣 🍽️ RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer Kitchen Appliances - https://bit.ly/KitchenAppliancesIUse Knives I use - https://amzn.to/36VdxoF *********************** ⏩𝓢𝓾𝓫𝓼𝓬𝓻𝓲𝓫𝓮 𝓱𝓮𝓻𝓮: https://goo.gl/UE2pmL *********************** 𝗖𝗵𝗲𝗰𝗸 𝗼𝘂𝘁 𝘁𝗵𝗲𝘀𝗲 𝗿𝗲𝗰𝗶𝗽𝗲𝘀 𝘁𝗼𝗼: No Bake Cheesecake - https://youtu.be/q4wUWqV8kjc Eggless Chocolate Truffle Cake - https://youtu.be/w-yg_Ik84j8 *********************** CHHENA PODA Preparation time 10 minutes Cooking time is 50 minutes in the pressure cooker or 200° C for 1 hour in the oven Serving 2-4 Ingredients (For Chhena ) 2 ltr Milk , दूध 1 - 2 Lemon juice, नींबू का रस / 2 tbsp vinegar in 1/2 cup water (For Mixture) ½ cup Sugar, चीनी 1 tsp Green cardamom powder, हरी इलायची पाउडर 8-10 Cashewnut, chopped, काजू 5-6 Almonds, chopped, बादाम 6-8 Pistachios, blanched, chopped, पिस्ता 2 tsp Semolina, रवा A pinch of baking soda, बेकिंग सोडा ½ tp Oil, तेल 1 tbsp Remaining chenna water, छेना का पानी A pinch of salt, नमक (For Baking) 1 cup Salt, नमक pressure cooker , cake tin Other Ingredients Sal leaves, साल के पत्ते (Optional) Process In a large sauce pot, add milk and bring it to boil. Add lime juice. Keep on stirring and you will see the milk getting curdled. Onces the milk gets curdled, pour the curdled milk into a bowl lined with a thin cotton napkin or muslin cloth. Gently squeeze out the remaining whey from it. Keep the remaining whey for further use. In a parat or bowl, add the prepared chenna crumble and mash slightly, making sure the texture is uniform. Add sugar, green cardamom powder and mix well until the sugar melts completely. Add all dry fruits, semolina and mix it well. In a small bowl mix oil and baking soda together, transfer it into a parat and mix it well. Add little remaining whey water and prepare a smooth cake batter consistency. Preheat the oven at 200° C. Grease a cake mould with oil. Place the sal leaves into the cake mould. Pour the chenna poda mixture into the mould and tap twice. Cover the mould with a lid. Bake in the preheated oven for 1 hour or 50 minutes in the pressure cooker. Bake chena poda till the top crust gets a dark golden color. Remove from the oven once done. Then check with a bamboo skewer or toothpick and it should be clean. There should be no sticky batter on the toothpick. Let the chenna poda cool completely in the pan. Then remove it. Cut into pieces. Transfer into a serving plate and serve. *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar on your favorite Social Media channels: ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar #ChhenaPoda #Chhenapodabananekividhi #chhanapoda #cheesecake #chennapodakaisebanatehain #howtomakechhenapoda

description: MUMBAI STYLE CHINESE BHEL - Kuch teekha, chatpata, crrunchy snack ho jaaye? Try my recipe for Mumbai Street Style Chinese Bhel with Veg Manchurian. #VegManchurian #MumbaiBhel #RanveerBrar SCHEZWAN SAUCE RECIPE - https://youtu.be/MtQd4zNuDqQ ***********************
ingredients: 1 small Carrot - julienned (गाजर) | 1 small Capsicum - julienned (शिमला मिर्च) | 1 Spring Onion - chopped (प्याज़ पत्ता) | 2 tbsp Schezwan Sauce (शेज़वान सॉस) | 1 tbsp Red Chilli Sauce (रेड चिली सॉस) | 1 cup Fried Noodles (तले हुए नूडल्स) | ¼ tsp Vinegar (सिरका) | 2 cups boiled Noodles (उबले हुए नूडल्स) | 1 medium Carrot - chopped (गाजर) | 1 fresh Green Chilli - chopped (हरी मिर्च) | 2 tbsp Coriander Leaves - chopped (धनिया पत्ता) | 1 inch Ginger - chopped (अदरक) | Salt to taste (नमक स्वादानुसार) | 2 tbsp Refined Flour (मैदा) | 2 tbsp Corn-starch (कॉर्न स्टार्च) | ½ tsp Black Pepper Powder (काली मिर्च का पाउडर)

http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** BREAD PAKODA CHAAT Preparation time 10 minutes Cooking time 20-25 minutes Serving 2 Ingredients 1 tbsp Oil, तेल ½ inch Ginger, chopped, अदरक 2-4 French beans, chopped, फ्रेंच बींस 1 medium size Carrot, finely chopped, गाजर 2 Green chillies, roughly chopped, हरी मिर्च 1 tsp Degi red chilli powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर ½ tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर ¼ tsp Coriander powder, धनिया पाउडर 2 medium size Potato, boiled & mashed, आलू Salt to taste, नमक स्वादानुसार Prepared Masala, तैयार किया हुआ मसाला 1 tbsp Coriander leaves, chopped, धनिया पत्ता For Masala 2 tbsp Cumin seeds, जीरा 1 tbsp Fennel seeds, सॉफ 1 tbsp Coriander seeds, धनिया के बीज 1 tbsp Black peppercorns, काली मिर्च के दाने Salt, नमक For Toasting Buns 2 tbsp Butter, cubes, मक्खन A pinch of degi red chilli powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर A pinch of garam masala, गरम मसाला 2 Burger buns, cut into half, बर्गर बन For Batter 1½ cups Gram flour, बेसन ¼ cup Semolina, रवा ½ tsp Degi red chilli powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर A pinch of asafoetida, हींग 2 tbsp Curd, दही ¼ tsp Carom seeds, अजवाइन ¼ tsp Baking soda, खाने का सोडा Salt to taste, नमक स्वादानुसार Oil for deep frying, तेल तलने के लिए Other Ingredients Curd, beaten, दही Fried Boondi, तली हुई बूंदी Pomegranate pearls, अनार के दाने Tamarind chutney, इमली की चटनी Green chutney, हरी चटनी Nylon sev, सेव Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता Process Heat oil in a pan, add ginger, green chillies, french beans, carrot and saute it well. Add degi red chilli powder, turmeric powder, coriander powder, salt to taste and saute for a minute. Add boiled & mashed potatoes and mix everything well. Now add the prepared masala, chopped coriander leaves and mix it well. Onces it's done transfer it into a bowl and keep it aside for future use. For Masala In a pan, add cumin seeds, fennel seeds, coriander seeds, black peppercorns and salt dry roast on medium flame. Transfer this into a mortar pestle and grind it coarsely. Keep aside for future use. For Toasting Buns In a pan, add butter, once it's melted add degi red chilli powder, garam masala to toast the burger buns from both the sides properly. For Batter In a bowl, add gram flour, semolina, degi red chilli powder, a pinch of asafoetida, and curd. Add carom seeds, baking soda, salt to taste and water as required. Make a thick consistency batter. Add the prepared mixture in the burger buns close it. Heat oil in a kadai. Dip burger buns in the prepared batter and deep fry till golden brown and crisp. Drain on absorbent paper and set aside. Cut into small pieces and transfer to a serving plate. Drizzle sweetened yogurt, tamarind chutney and green chutney on top. Sprinkle some nylon sev, pomegranate pearls, and fried boondi on top. Garnish it with coriander sprig and serve hot. *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar on your favorite Social Media channels: ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar
